programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Bring My Baby Home
programme.desc: A four-week-old girl is kidnapped, leaving her mother in anguish and police scrambling to find her. Joe Kenda and Robert Sapp fear she’s been sold on the black market… or worse.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Knock Knock
programme.desc: A gathering of friends turns deadly when two gunmen shoot William Davis in the head. Kenda and his team dig into his past and start to suspect someone in William’s circle is lying.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: My, My, Merry Christmas
programme.desc: Donald Ott is found shot to death, friends tell police he didn’t have an enemy in the world. But when Lt. Joe Kenda speaks with family, he learns of a relative who might hold the key to the mystery.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: I Will Hunt You Down
programme.desc: When two escaped inmates surface in Colorado Springs, it’s up to Lt. Joe Kenda and his Fugitive Unit to bring them to justice.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Run for your Life
programme.desc: A slain body of a marathon runner is found just hours before a big race. With the help of a trusted K-9 officer, Kenda sets off to find the killer himself before he strikes again.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: John 3:16
programme.desc: A man rushes his friend to the hospital with serious gunshot wounds, reporting they were robbed by strangers. When the facts don’t add up, Lt. Joe Kenda and his team go on the hunt.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Rearview Mirror
programme.desc: When a retired military man runs over a pedestrian, it’s up to Lt. Joe Kenda to determine if it was bad brakes or bad intent.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: A Prayer for the Dying
programme.desc: A mother of two is found dead in the most expensive part of Colorado Springs, leaving Lt. Joe Kenda stumped—until he looks into her personal life.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Tighten the Screws
programme.desc: When young Iraq War veteran Curtis Ashley ends up dead, Lt. Joe Kenda has to solve the slaying of a seemingly innocent victim using his keen awareness of the criminal mind.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: The Line Goes Dead
programme.desc: When the severed head of a wife and mother is found, Lt. Joe Kenda uses forensics and interrogation to find both her body and her killer.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: My Worst Fear
programme.desc: Police are shocked to find a 13-year-old boy killed in an explosion, but their grief turns to alarm when they discover a second, unexploded bomb.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Death Grip
programme.desc: When a speeding truck crashes into a residential building, officers find the lifeless body of Michael Faast behind the wheel. But he didn’t die in the wreck – he was shot point-blank in the temple.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter
programme.desc: When police find 24-year-old Patrick Ray with a gunshot to the temple, the scene has all the telltale signs of suicide. But Lt. Joe Kenda's instinct says otherwise.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Raise the Dead
programme.desc: When a tip comes in suggesting foul play on a 71yr old man, Lt. Joe Kenda is left with only one way to reveal the truth: exhume the body from its grave.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Magic Bullet
programme.desc: A hard-working father of two is shot in the head just steps from a notorious strip club. The case is stuck in neutral until Kenda uncovers a conspiracy organized by an unlikely triggerman.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Poker Face
programme.desc: A group of friends discover the corpse of entrepreneur Jamie Foster hidden under a blanket. Kenda e discovers that Foster’s business put him in close quarters with a host of unsavory characters.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Murder Bites
programme.desc: A young woman is found naked and strangled in a park not 200 yards from her home. It isn’t until Lt. Joe Kenda rethinks the entire case that he realizes someone has been lying.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: A Gathering of Evil
programme.desc: Teen runaway Maggie Fetty is found strangled to death on a mountain road. An anonymous tipster blames Maggie’s best friend, but she accuses a mental patient with multiple personalities.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Fear of Dogs
programme.desc: After being attacked by a dog as a boy, a man must learn to overcome his fear of dogs for the sake of his career and his wife and children. Cesar is called in to exorcise Ernesto’s fear.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Doubt of a Shadow
programme.desc: Newly adopted Shadow starts to exhibit aggressive tendencies towards his family. A professional dog walker needs help with several of her clients.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Harry & Brooks
programme.desc: Harry wants to charge after anything with wheels, including passing cyclists, rollerbladers or skateboarders. Brooks, an Entlebucher, is constantly chasing after light, he is never calm.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Hollywood Hounds
programme.desc: Cesar helps exercise guru Jillian Michaels and TV star Kelsey Grammer train their troublesome pets.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Lives Changed
programme.desc: In this special episode, Cesar revisits some of the incredible Dog Whisperer stories of the past four years and shares his reactions to the changes in the lives of these special packs.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Vicky & Taz, Punkin, and Maddy
programme.desc: Vicious Min Pins endanger a couple's home-based business; Pit Bull mix develops an unhealthy obsession with rocks; Cesar helps an adopted Terrier mix overcome her fear of men.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Sonny, Cinnamon & Chocolate, and Boo
programme.desc: Pug and pet pig get rowdy; emotionally scarred Shepherd; two Dachshunds make an unsavory mix.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Bella & Big Boy, and Gracie
programme.desc: Marley and Me author John Grogan gets a new yellow Lab. Just like Marley, Gracie needs lessons in respect. Paul Frank Industries lets employees bring their dogs to work.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Joe, and Penny, Roxy, Rico, Lou, & Solomon, and Promise
programme.desc: An Australian shepherd is so devoted to his owner that he breaks leashes to be with her; a neurotic beagle makes trouble for a pack of foster dogs; and an Italian mastiff puppy fears riding in cars.
programme.sub-title: Joe, and Penny, Roxy, Rico, Lou, & Solomon, and Promise

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Bella
programme.desc: After being boarded for 5 months, American bulldog Bella evolved into a food, people, and dog aggressive pet. Owner Nate is scared he will have to euthanize her if her behavior doesn’t change.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Pasha, Cosmo, and Contessa
programme.desc: Pasha lashes out at people, especially children. Cosmo’s bitten several people including the postman. Contessa is highly aggressive towards TV shows, especially Dog Whisperer.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Inside Puppy Mills
programme.desc: This powerful episode delves into the horror of puppy mills and the rescue and rehab of traumatized pups by the Last Chance for Animals non-profit organization.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Cesar’s Toughest Cases
programme.desc: This episode features several of Cesar's toughest cases including: a skateboard munching Bulldog, vicious Min-Pin and ferocious Chihuahua. Plus, updates on how the dogs are doing now.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Tobi & Riley
programme.desc: Cesar works with sheepdog/collie mix, Tobi who is aggressive with his owners and their guests. Then Cesar takes on the supposedly easy task of curing a St. Bernard who is afraid of stairs.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Opie & Flirt
programme.desc: Black lab mix Opie is a charmer around people, but frighteningly aggressive around other dogs. Energetic to the point of being neurotic, Chinese Crested Flirt cannot sit still for one moment.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Cesar helps dogs overcome their fears including a whippet mix who is blind and deaf, a labradoodle that fears the ocean, and a cocker spaniel that fears all humans.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Nightmare in Central Park, Bad Boy Baxter
programme.desc: Curly, an adopted lab-greyhound mix, is aggressive with other dogs. Rhodesian Ridgeback/Boxer mix Baxter is rescued after wandering the streets but has severe dog aggression.
programme.sub-title: Nightmare in Central Park, Bad Boy Baxter

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Nuna & Kane
programme.desc: NuNu the Chihuahua, fiercely attacks anyone who comes near his owner Tina. NuNu’s total opposite, Kane the Great Dane, is vehemently afraid of shiny surfaces

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Homewrecking Hounds
programme.desc: Cesar helps a newlywed couple whose dogs don't let them get close and another pair who met online and are nervous about introducing their dogs.

programme.title: Baywatch: White Thunder at Glacier Bay, Part 2
programme.desc: After an escalating, heart-stopping chase across a glacier, Mitch rescues Hobie and Leslie from hitman Gavin. Mitch returns to the Dawn Princess with a romantic proposal for Neely.
programme.sub-title: White Thunder at Glacier Bay, Part 2

programme.title: Baywatch: Crash, Part 1
programme.desc: Mitch's marriage to Neely falls apart when her ex-husband arrives at Baywatch and they learn the truth about their cruise ship wedding. Cody and April fly to New York, but a frantic rescue effort ensues when their plane crashes during take-off.

programme.title: Baywatch: Crash, Part 2
programme.desc: Mitch struggles with Neely's lies and the truth about their shipboard wedding. Cody and April race to save survivors of their plane crash. A tragic turn of events puts April in mortal danger when half the plane's fuselage sinks beneath the Pacific.

programme.title: Baywatch: Sharks, Lies and Videotape
programme.desc: Captain Alexis "Alex" Ryker, the conniving CEO of a private lifeguard company, wants to take over Baywatch to expand her private lifeguarding empire. Mitch suspects Alex of setting up fake rescues and recruits Cody to spy on the BayGuard team.

programme.title: Baywatch: Dolphin Quest
programme.desc: Cody accompanies Alex on a vacation to Hawaii where she wants to take her autistic 10-year-old nephew, Timmy, to swim with dolphin in the local lagoon. Cody spends quality time with Lani's sister, Callie, a local Hawaiian lifeguard.

programme.title: Baywatch: The Natural
programme.desc: A mysterious lifeguard makes rescues around Baywatch, then vanishes. After going over Mitch's head one too many times, Alex gets an annoying new partner.

programme.title: Baywatch: Drop Zone
programme.desc: April suffers PTSD after losing a rescue victim. Mitch and the victim's widow refuse to give up searching for his body. Jessie runs into an old beau who could undermine her future at Baywatch.

programme.title: Baywatch: Hot Summer Night
programme.desc: Hobie struggles with his irresponsible actions leading to a boating accident that leaves a girl in a coma. Jessie is gripped with fear after April tells her of a recent, job-related tragedy.

programme.title: Baywatch: Swept Away
programme.desc: Mitch befriends a boy who joins junior lifeguards in hopes of escaping a brutal home life. Jessie makes a passionate play for JD. Alex auditions for “Jeopardy!”

programme.title: Baywatch: The Swimmer
programme.desc: Upset about his failed marriage to Neely, Mitch goes for a day-long tower swim along the beach and encounters problems that distract from his own, including April and Craig's May/December romance, and reluctant heroes Cody and JD.

programme.title: Baywatch: Friends Forever
programme.desc: A young, hearing-impaired girl learns a lesson in friendship when she, Mitch and Alex protect an orangutan, while Cody and Jessie deal with its abusive owner.

programme.title: Baywatch: The Edge
programme.desc: Cody puts his career, and his life, on the line when he uses a performance-enhancing supplement in hopes of making the Olympic swim team. Alex becomes the object of Mitch's rejection, and Newmie's affection.

programme.title: Baywatch: The Big Blue
programme.desc: Mitch tries to reunite an Army parachutist with her estranged Naval-officer father, while Cody helps a beautiful woman try to reach record-setting depths at a national free-diving competition.

programme.title: Baywatch: Come Fly with Me
programme.desc: After he tries to save Tanner from his abusive father, Mitch ends up on the wrong side of the law. Meanwhile, Jessie's irresistible charm makes a stunt pilot's heart take flight.

programme.title: Baywatch: Boys will be Boys
programme.desc: When caught up in a high-risk adventure at sea, Craig tells Mitch a shocking secret. Meanwhile, Jessie works to creatively end JD and Cody's rivalry during a beachside triathlon, and April comes clean with Manny.

programme.title: Baywatch: Baywatch Grand Prix
programme.desc: Mitch feels the need for speed when Tanner's cousin, Damon Lusk, a race car driver in town for a major competition, visits Baywatch. Meanwhile, Newmie and the gang develop a TV show about lifeguards that they try to sell it into syndication.

programme.title: Baywatch: Baywatch Down Under, Part 1
programme.desc: After Mitch's lifeguard buddy's ex-wife dies in Australia, Mitch and the team accompany him on a trip down under to meet the son he's never known.

programme.title: Baywatch: Baywatch Down Under, Part 2
programme.desc: While team Baywatch prepares to compete against the Australian guards, Jake must choose between staying down under with his son or returning home. The competing lifeguards must put their intense rivalry aside to save a life.

programme.title: Baywatch: Water Dance
programme.desc: Cody learns a lesson in love when he and Mitch help a troubled violinist escape her dangerously overbearing mentor with a secret agenda. Meanwhile, Alex sets out to prove her worth at Baywatch by retaking the grueling rookie test with Jessie.

programme.title: Baywatch: Double Jeopardy
programme.desc: Alex tries to save a diamond smuggler whose partners want him to "sleep with the fishes." Neely makes Hobie a tempting offer that divides the Buchannon household.

programme.title: Dark Oracle
programme.desc: When the comic predicts that Dizzy will become a rock star, the "Dister" surprises everyone by entering a local "Canadian Idol" type contest.

programme.title: Dark Oracle
programme.desc: When Vern decides to use his expertise in the dark arts to grow his own "familiar", Cally and Lance use the comic clues to find it before the it hatches.

programme.title: Summer of Fear
programme.desc: A teenage girl's life is turned upside down after her cousin moves into her house, and as time goes by she begins to suspect that she may be a practitioner of witchcraft.

programme.title: Colonel March of Scotland Yard: At Night All Cats Are Gray
programme.desc: A lady claims an odd man is following her and fears for her life. She’s later found murdered...in mismatched color, a telling clue for the inspector.

programme.title: Colonel March of Scotland Yard: The Case of the Kidnapped Poodle
programme.desc: Colonel March investigates a valuable stolen diamond as well as the kidnapping of a little boy's poodle; he thinks both incidents may be connected.

programme.title: Colonel March of Scotland Yard: The Invisible Knife
programme.desc: March must solve the mystery of how a man could be stabbed to death by an invisible knife, while attempting to summon The Devil during a black rite.

programme.title: Colonel March of Scotland Yard: The Strange Event at Roman Fall
programme.desc: A wife reports her husband, a reclusive mystery writer, has fallen off a cliff. Suspicion points to her as the killer and Colonel March investigates.

programme.title: Colonel March of Scotland Yard: The Headless Hat
programme.desc: While on holiday in France, there is a murder at the docks and Colonel March is asked by a friend of the French police to assist.

programme.title: Colonel March of Scotland Yard: The Second Mona Lisa
programme.desc: The Second Mona Lisa,' painted six months after the first, is targeted by rival collectors. Colonel March is determined to reveal the truth.

programme.title: Colonel March of Scotland Yard: Death In Inner Space
programme.desc: A scientist seeks a way to suspend bodily life functions during space travel, and his test subject dies from lack of oxygen. Accident or foul play?

programme.title: Deadtime Stories
programme.desc: "Bloody Mary… " It was just a silly wishing game; one that Lindsey and her friends had played a thousand times in front of a dozen different mirrors.

programme.title: Deadtime Stories
programme.desc: Peter Newman wants a brand new mountain bike. That's the grand prize for winning the school's talent competition. Now all he needs is a talent.

programme.title: Deadtime Stories
programme.desc: For Katie and Andy Lawrence, moving to a new town is painful enough. But when their parents take them on a boring sight-seeing tour, it's nothing but torture.

programme.title: Deadtime Stories
programme.desc: Everyone in Baskerville knows about Jimmy Leeds. In fact, Adam and his friends have been telling scary stories about Jimmy for years—stories they don't really believe.

programme.title: Deadtime Stories
programme.desc: Willy Tyler has the coolest train set-up ever. It takes up half of Willy’s attic and encompasses everything from medieval times to the Wild West.

programme.title: Deadtime Stories
programme.desc: For Catan Thomas and his cousin, Lea, being trapped in Bumbleweed for a family reunion and their grandfather’s 70th birthday is painful enough.

programme.title: Deadtime Stories
programme.desc: When Cody visits his grandparents at Shady Acres, he’s not expecting to find any excitement at all.

programme.title: Deadtime Stories
programme.desc: It’s all Sammy’s fault. If only he and Nina hadn’t been out in those woods in the first place. If only they hadn’t seen that creepy old tree with the strange little door.

programme.title: One Step Beyond: Vanishing Point
programme.desc: Quarrelsome couple Fred and Ruth Graham rent an old house but, following an argument, Ruth disappears. Fred is tried for her murder but released for lack of evidence.

programme.title: One Step Beyond: The Mask
programme.desc: During World War II, Lt. Wilenski bails out of a crippled plane over the Sahara Desert, but the harsh and unrelenting conditions in the desert almost result in his death.

programme.title: One Step Beyond: The Haunting
programme.desc: Suspecting his friend Peter of having an affair with his bride-to-be, Colin Chandler allows him to die following a climbing accident. However ghostly happenings interrupt the wedding ceremony resulting in punishment for Colin and his eventual breakdown.

programme.title: One Step Beyond: The Explorer
programme.desc: In Germany in 1911 Felix Borgner is visited by Dr Hansen, one of three explorers who got lost in the desert the previous year and were saved and guided back to safety by Borgner's son Eric.

programme.title: One Step Beyond: The Clown
programme.desc: A guilt-ridden murderer looks in a mirror and sees the image of a mute clown drawing near to throttle him.

programme.title: One Step Beyond: I Saw You Tomorrow
programme.desc: As he arrives at a large mansion, a man suddenly has a vision of a woman being murdered. Later, he is stunned to see the woman he saw in the vision show up as a guest at the estate.

programme.title: One Step Beyond: Encounter
programme.desc: A small construction crew is set on edge when a pilot and his plane suddenly disappear, his last radio message frantically reporting a mountain descending from the clouds and coming right at him.

programme.title: One Step Beyond: The Peter Hurkos Story Part 2
programme.desc: Following his experiences Hurkos begins to work with parapsychologist Dr Lindsteom and the police and is credited with assisting in the capture of real-life serial killers. Hurkos himself finally appears on screen.

programme.title: Surrounded
programme.desc: To boost viewership of their popular travel vlog, a group of millennial friends document their illegal snorkelling trip to a beautiful cove.

programme.title: Halloween
programme.desc: Fifteen years after murdering his sister on Halloween night 1963, Michael Myers escapes from a mental hospital and returns to the small town of Haddonfield, Illinois to kill again. Starring: Donald Pleasence, Jamie Lee Curtis, Tony Moran

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: The Candidate
programme.desc: Margaret finds herself inadvertently running for City Council when the candidate she is supporting drops out of the race.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: Gary
programme.desc: Bob and Margaret thought they knew everything about their next door neighbours, until Joyce and Trevor introduce them to their grown son, Gary.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: Fish at the Bat
programme.desc: Bob gets cajoled into joining his office softball team.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: Discomfort of Strangers
programme.desc: Margaret fears that her relationship with Bob is getting stale after they have a petty argument.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: Til Death Do Us
programme.desc: Bob gets conned into buying a cemetery plot for Margaret as a surprise 15th wedding anniversary gift.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: The Player
programme.desc: Bob attends a personal finance seminar to help him get his hopeless financial house in order.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: Love's Labours Lost
programme.desc: While listening to the radio, Bob observes his charmless young assistant Penny, inspiring him to recite odes about youth and innocence.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: The Cuckoo in the Nest
programme.desc: When Bobs old friend Clive, (who is a real drunken slob), is dumped by his wife, Bob lets him stay for a few days despite Margaret's objections?

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: Going Dutch
programme.desc: Margaret enters a contest and wins the grand prize: a cycling tour of Holland!

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: For Peter's Sake
programme.desc: Bob's brother Peter is a successful chef who has a cooking show producing in India.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: New Lease on Life
programme.desc: Bob and Margaret have near-death experience when Bob nearly crashes their car.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: A Patient Dies in Bob's Chair
programme.desc: When a patient dies of natural causes while in Bob's surgery, the local papers pick up the story?
programme.sub-title: A Patient Dies in Bob's Chair

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: Undefined Border
programme.desc: Bob and Margaret go cross-border shopping in the United States.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: On Location
programme.desc: A film crew sets up shop on Bob and Margaret's street, giving them a small and unsavory taste of fame and fortune.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: Life Saver
programme.desc: Bob inadvertently saves the life of a suicidal man who then decides to become Bob's best friend.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: Animal Behaviour
programme.desc: Bob and Margaret arrive home from another boring evening out with dreary friends, to find that their dogs behaviour has taken a turn for the worse?

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: Jury Duty
programme.desc: Margaret gets called to Jury Duty but Bob has planned a holiday for them and begs her to get herself excused.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: The Holiday
programme.desc: This charming, witty animated series focuses on the ordinary lives of a middle class dentist and his foot doctor wife. Together, they tackle traumas as being burgled, going on a holiday and deciding whether or not having a child will ruin their lives.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: Blood, Sweat and Tears
programme.desc: Bob and Margaret decide they need to get fit.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: Shopping
programme.desc: Bob and Margaret, concerned at the amount they are spending in take away food and expensive local food shops, decide on an expedition to the Super Save Shopatropolis in Croydon.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: Cottage Country
programme.desc: Bob and Margaret get invited up to the cottage of Dr. Yoselheiffer, President of the Canadian Council of Dentists.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: Bob Gets Wired
programme.desc: When Margaret forgets to pay for some sprinkles at the local cake shop, she is hauled in as a shoplifter.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: Bob's Burglary
programme.desc: While Bob and Margaret are sleeping, the local criminals, Beany and Boney clear their house - TV, video, microwave and electric toothbrush all go.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: Neighbours
programme.desc: In this story of neighbourhood social angst, Bob is having a complex burglar alarm installed by Graham, a sad, lonely man whose confidence is lifted immeasurably by this rare sale to Bob.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: The Getaway
programme.desc: Margaret is nominated for the Golden Arch Support award for outstanding service in the field of footcare.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: The Wedding
programme.desc: Cookie and Melvin invite Bob and Margaret to the wedding of their goddaughter, Tiffany.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: Stranded in Toronto
programme.desc: When Bob and Margaret take a trip to New York, their flight is re-routed to Toronto due to a storm.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: A Tale of Two Dentists
programme.desc: Bob's business is booming, and when Margaret chips a tooth Bob tells Margaret that he is unable to give her an appointment for sometime.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: The Dental Convention
programme.desc: The time for the annual dental convention has come. Bob is not keen on going when he sees that a colleague from his student days, Bernard Wiggins, a "loud mouthed big shot", is a featured speaker.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: A New Life
programme.desc: At a creepy chiropodist social night, Bob and Margaret encounter a couple who are rapturous about the new planned community where they now live.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: Margaret Gets a Job
programme.desc: Bob and Margaret have made the big move to Canada.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: Friends for Dinner
programme.desc: Bob and Margaret have been invited to Neil and Moira's for dinner, or so they think.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: The Trouble with Mummy
programme.desc: Bob is concerned when he hears that his mother's best friend Pearl has passed on.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: Strangers in a Strange Land
programme.desc: Bob and Margaret are mortified to discover that while they have been cooped up at Cookie and Melvin's house in Mississauga Ontario, their dogs have been left unattended by Penny, Bob's unreliable receptionist.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: No Trouble
programme.desc: This charming, witty animated series focuses on the ordinary lives of a middle class dentist and his foot doctor wife. Together, they tackle traumas as being burgled, going on a holiday and deciding whether or not having a child will ruin their lives.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: Gone to Seed
programme.desc: Bob decides to donate his sperm to a local sperm bank.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: A Bob or Two
programme.desc: Bob buys an inexpensive painting from the neighbours at a junk sale (mostly motivated by pity since these neighbours have fallen on hard times) and hangs it in his surgery to brighten things up?

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: A Night In
programme.desc: Bob and Margaret find themselves at loose ends one evening when, to their dismay, they find that there is absolutely nothing to watch on TV.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: I, Bob
programme.desc: When an efficiency expert comes to assess the Inner City Dental Clinic, Bob gets side shifted out of a job.

programme.title: On the Case: From Dusk to Darkness
programme.desc: After a 10-year-old girl mysteriously disappears, her family and the police undergo a tormenting journey to find a lead.

programme.title: On the Case: A Promise Kept
programme.desc: A cold-case detective reopens a decades-old murder case and promises to get justice on behalf of the victim's family.

programme.title: On the Case: As She Lay Dying
programme.desc: August 19th, 2014. It was a hot afternoon in Portland, Oregon when police received a distressing 911-call. A woman had been stabbed at an apartment complex. By the time first responders arrived, the victim had already lost too much blood to be saved.

programme.title: On the Case: Trapped by Lies
programme.desc: Before police can catch a depraved killer of a 15 year old girl, they must first unravel a puzzling series of lies.

programme.title: On the Case: Blurred Truth
programme.desc: Paula Zahn explores a chilling crime mystery involving a murdered mother of five and speaks to the individuals directly involved in the case

programme.title: On the Case: Painful Memories
programme.desc: A young marine comes home and finds his nine month pregnant wife savagely beaten in their bedroom. Was he an innocent victim or could he have been responsible for the terrible crime.

programme.title: On the Case: No Body Two Crimes
programme.desc: A Wilmington, North Carolina, woman is reported missing after she fails to show up for her own birthday celebration. Police never imagined that their investigation would ultimately reveal a gruesome second crime.

programme.title: On the Case: A Fateful Decision
programme.desc: A Young mother is kidnapped out of her driveway after a birthday celebration... Did a string of good luck, lead to her disappearance.

programme.title: On the Case: Pattern of Violence
programme.desc: A 22 year old real estate agent is discovered strangled to death inside a model home she was trying to sell.

programme.title: On the Case: Gone in Less Than 3 Minutes
programme.desc: A teenage lifeguard vanishes from a quiet community swimming hole less than three minutes after her mother dropped her off for work.

programme.title: On the Case: Deadly Silence
programme.desc: An 18-year-old woman never returns home after a night out with friends, and the police come up against a wall of silence that keeps them from uncovering the truth.

programme.title: On the Case: One of Us
programme.desc: A young records clerk at the Seattle police department is murdered on her way to work her overnight shift. Can police find the evidence to catch the killer of one of their own?

programme.title: On the Case: Cry on My Shoulder
programme.desc: When a young woman disappears, police zero in on her violent ex-boyfriend. But the secret to solving the case is buried in a cold case file.

programme.title: On the Case: Twisted Lies
programme.desc: In Las Vegas, 41-year-old Nancy Menke, a mother of four, is found handcuffed and murdered in the passenger seat of her car; a records clerk in the insurance fraud unit stumbles upon a strange report that blows open Menke's murder case.

programme.title: On the Case: Unanswered Questions
programme.desc: Patti Berry disappears on the way to pick up her child at the babysitter's, then her body is found in a secluded wooded area not far from her abandoned blood-soaked car.

programme.title: On the Case: Deadly Deception
programme.desc: Officers investigate the death of a father of four who was gunned down, however nothing about the crime is what it appears to be.

programme.title: On the Case: Follow the Footprints
programme.desc: When a young girl's lifeless body turns up on the shore of the Feather River, police hope that following a trail of footsteps and discarded articles of clothing will lead them to her killer.

programme.title: On the Case: Nine Days of Terror
programme.desc: When a young college student disappears out of a mall parking lot, police find themselves in a race against time to find her before it is too late.

programme.title: On the Case: A Killer Among Friends
programme.desc: When a teenager is found savagely murdered, police must retrace her last steps alive to identify her killer.

programme.title: Starhunter Redux: Stitch in Time (REDUX)
programme.desc: While transporting Ritson, a deserter from the Jup-Fed Elite Forces, the Trans-Utopian answers a distress call from a mining platform on the asteroid Ida: a mining platform that should not exist.

programme.title: Starhunter Redux: The Prisoner (REDUX)
programme.desc: Travis and Callie pick up a psychiatric patient with amnesia, who grows to remember Travis and wants him dead. In parallel, the new Orchard leader Tristan Catchpole set his sights on Travis, who may have some of his Cluster genes activated.

programme.title: Starhunter Redux: Kate (REDUX)
programme.desc: After the Trans-Utopian collides with a mine, Percy, unhappy with Caravaggio's recent crisis performance, creates a female Al program with more intuition, but it quickly develops too much independence... and an attraction to Travis.

programme.title: Black Hole High: Lost
programme.desc: Odd magnetic field effects cause Josie and Vaughn to lose their way in the forest while searching for the Pearadyne Labs building.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: Mr. Right
programme.desc: Sydney runs into her ex Gray and goes on a holiday with him to Bali, but when Derek Lloyd shows up to enlist her to find Parvati's Bowl, she can't resist.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: Sydney at Ten
programme.desc: Sydney's roommate from school is on track of a pendant from her past and enlists Sydney to help find it and catch the killer.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: The Light of Truth
programme.desc: Arabia 843 AD: A sheik uses the Light of Truth to reveal his general as a traitor. 2001: Prince Shareem drops out from Sydney's class to go search for the Light of Truth.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: Treasure Island
programme.desc: Sydney's on the hunt for a Pirate's booty, but will a traitor force her to walk the plank?

programme.title: Relic Hunter: Women Want to Know
programme.desc: Sydney has found a temple with an idol of Ganesha and it is being filmed for TV, but they get trapped inside when the local rebels stumble onto them. Can Nigel and Karen help from USA?

programme.title: Relic Hunter: The Star of Nadir
programme.desc: An anonymous Sultan's wife Danielle dies in mysterious circumstances in the desert. However, she had called for Sydney to help. Sydney believes Danielle was searching for the Star of Nadir.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: Devil Doll
programme.desc: A guide leads Sydney and Nigel to an unusual, underground Aztec burial chamber. Instead of a body, they find a relic.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: Incognito
programme.desc: Retrieving a mythical lancet, Sydney and Nigel run into Nigel's look-alike just before his death. Nigel gets a cut from the lancet. Later, Cate persuades Nigel to impersonate the man.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: All Choked Up
programme.desc: Carson Inez, a collector, uses an ancient necklace to get Sydney to help her in raising Athena who will then help her conquer the world.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: Warlock of Nu Theta Phi
programme.desc: When Sydney's student Meg's roommate finds a witch's amulet, it hospitalizes Meg. Meg's boyfriend's fraternity brother races to get the amulet. What is he up to?

programme.title: Relic Hunter: Fire in the Sky
programme.desc: While Sydney is lecturing about the Native Americans who faced a mysterious cataclysm 600 years earlier, a native brings her a relic from that era. What is its secret?

programme.title: Farscape: Farscape: S1 E7 - I, E.T.
programme.desc: A peacekeeper beacon goes off and Moya has to land on an alien planet to prevent its signal being intercepted and Moya being discovered.

programme.title: Farscape: Farscape: S1 E8 - That Old Black Magic
programme.desc: Crichton's spirit is captured by Maldis. The sorcerer thrives on vengeance and hate, he brings Crais's spirit down. And the two spirits battle.
programme.sub-title: Farscape: S1 E8 - That Old Black Magic

programme.title: Farscape: Farscape: S1 E9 - DNA Mad Scientist
programme.desc: A scientist extracts DNA from several of Moya's crew, promising them that he would be able to use it to find the location of their home planets.
programme.sub-title: Farscape: S1 E9 - DNA Mad Scientist

programme.title: Farscape: Farscape: S1 E10 - They've Got A Secret
programme.desc: During routine searches for Peacekeeper beacons, D'Argo falls down a chute, destroys a Peacekeeper shield and gets ejected into open space.
programme.sub-title: Farscape: S1 E10 - They've Got A Secret

programme.title: Farscape: Farscape: S1 E11 - 'Til The Blood Runs Clear
programme.desc: While flying Crichton's ship near a sun with high flare activity, John and Aeryn narrowly avoid getting sucked into an unstable wormhole.
programme.sub-title: Farscape: S1 E11 - 'Til The Blood Runs Clear

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain: Rochdale Groomers
programme.desc: Rochdale Groomers: Documentary examining the sex abuse scandal which occurred in the North of England and appeared to go undetected for quite some time.

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain: Stephen Port
programme.desc: A chilling look at the crimes of Stephen Port, the east London serial killer who poisoned four young men with lethal doses of a date rape drug.

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain: Peter Tobin
programme.desc: Peter Tobin is one of the most notorious serial killers in the UK. From 1991–2006 he raped and murdered three young girls; Dinah McNicol, Vicky Hamilton and Angelika Kluk. Yet even prior to these horrific murders he had a history of violence.

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain: Angus Sinclair
programme.desc: Angus Sinclair, called Scotland's worst serial killer, is linked to the 1977 murders of two girls in Edinburgh.

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain: Christopher Foster
programme.desc: Failed businessman Christopher Foster killed his wife and daughter before burning their mansion in Shropshire to the ground in August 2008.

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain: Rolf Harris
programme.desc: Rolf Harris became famous for his artwork and music, even painting a portrait of the Queen for the jubilee. But it all came crumbling down in August 2013 when he was accused of 12 assaults on girls as young as eight years old between 1968 and 1986.

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain: The Russell Murders
programme.desc: Bludgeoned to death whilst walking down a country lane, the horrific murders of Lin and Megan Russell made worldwide news. Discover the events of that shocking day.

programme.title: Robbie Coltrane's Critical Evidence: The Saturday Night Strangler: Joe Kappen
programme.desc: In 1973, three young girls were beaten, raped and strangled over a six-week period. The Saturday Night Strangler escaped justice for almost 30 years. But new techniques in DNA technology and a midnight exhumation finally uncovered the killer.
programme.sub-title: The Saturday Night Strangler: Joe Kappen

programme.title: Robbie Coltrane's Critical Evidence: Time Of Death: Albert Walker
programme.desc: When a Devonshire fisherman hauled in his nets on July 28 1996, he made a gruesome discovery: among that day’s catch was a dead body. There was nothing to identify the man’s body except a Rolex watch and a small maple leaf tattoo on his hand.

programme.title: Robbie Coltrane's Critical Evidence: Appointment With Death: Scott Singleton
programme.desc: Robbie Coltrane examines the case of Scott Singleton, who murdered a 17-year-old girl after luring her to a bogus job interview.

programme.title: Robbie Coltrane's Critical Evidence: The Body In The Suitcase: Lorenzo Simon
programme.desc: On 12th May 2014 a human torso was discovered in a suitcase during routine maintenance work on a Birmingham canal. With no useable DNA and no other body parts, the case initially seemed impossible to crack.
programme.sub-title: The Body In The Suitcase: Lorenzo Simon

programme.title: Robbie Coltrane's Critical Evidence: The Hitman And The Hairdresser: Fadi Nasri
programme.desc: A 29-year-old hairdresser was found brutally stabbed on her doorstep in a quiet suburban street of London. A recording of a threatening phone call seemed to suggest the motive, but every lead comes to a dead end.
programme.sub-title: The Hitman And The Hairdresser: Fadi Nasri

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain: Steven Wright
programme.desc: A closer look at the crimes of Steve Wright, who was dubbed 'The Suffolk Strangler' after murdering five women who worked as prostitutes in Ipswich in 2006.

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain: Stepping Hill
programme.desc: An inside look at the series of mysterious deaths that occurred at Stepping Hill Hospital in Stockport, Greater Manchester, in 2011.

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain: Manchester
programme.desc: The series returns to take a closer look at the most horrific crimes ever committed on British soil, starting with the May 2017 Manchester Arena bombing.

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain: Dale Cregan
programme.desc: It's 2012 and drug dealer Dale Cregan murders police officers Nicola Hughes and Fiona Bone. Dermot Murnaghan investigates.

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain: The Moors Murders
programme.desc: An investigation into the Moors Murderers, Myra Hindley and Ian Brady, with interviews with the family of Keith Bennett.

programme.title: Murder Masterminds: The Farmer's Wife
programme.desc: When Shirley Carter was found murdered in her farmhouse kitchen, her abusive husband Bill was considered a prime suspect. But her husband pointed the finger at someone else - his son Jason. It was up to the jury to decide who to believe.

programme.title: Murder Masterminds: Murder On The Gulf Coast
programme.desc: When the body of former policewoman Taylor Wright was discovered buried on a remote Pensacola farm, detectives had a lineup of suspects to investigate, including her ex-husband from whom Taylor stole $100,000, and her new live-in girlfriend Casandra.

programme.title: Murder Masterminds: The Doctor Is Dead
programme.desc: The beautiful, highly popular Dr Teresa Sievers was a rising social media star when she was found bludgeoned to death in her Bonita Springs, Florida kitchen. It was the third suspicious death of a holistic doctor in recent weeks in the area.

programme.title: Secrets In The Ice: The Vanishing Of Flight CS-59
programme.desc: A secret underground military research station in the middle of the Greenland Ice Sheet is revealed as one of the most elaborate cover stories in the history of the Cold War.

programme.title: Secrets In The Ice: Curse Of The Ice Princess
programme.desc: Merging advanced scanning technology and scientific research, this series investigates curiosities that have been lost for millennia, or never seen before, exploring how and why they ended up in the most desolate and distant corners of the planet.

programme.title: Secrets In The Ice: Lost On Killer Mountain
programme.desc: Merging advanced scanning technology and scientific research, the series investigates the curiosities that have been lost for millennia, or never seen before, exploring how and why they ended up in the most desolate and distant corners of the planet.

programme.title: Secrets In The Ice: Inca Child Sacrifice
programme.desc: Merging advanced scanning technology and scientific research, the series investigates the curiosities that have been lost for millennia, or never seen before, exploring how and why they ended up in the most desolate and distant corners of the planet.

programme.title: Secrets In The Ice: Revenge Of The Ice Mummy
programme.desc: Canadian divers spot an object that may solve a Cold War nuclear mystery. A mummified businessman is found atop Mexico’s highest peak. In Iceland, a cave said to be home to a fire giant is investigated. Mummified penguins are found in Antarctica.

programme.title: Secrets In The Ice: Mystery Of The Arctic Shipwreck
programme.desc: A Russian mystery involving the deaths of nine hikers may finally be solved. A legendary ship is pulled from icy Arctic waters. In Antarctica, a melting glacier could cause a global disaster. Russian researchers find a strange arrangement of bones.

programme.title: Secrets In The Ice: Buried Secrets Of Mount Cook
programme.desc: Merging CGI recreations, advanced scanning technology and scientific research, this series journeys to the planet’s most remote, cold and inhospitable places to reveal great mysteries that were once frozen in time.

programme.title: Secrets In The Ice: Riddle Of Whale Bone Alley
programme.desc: Merging CGI recreations, advanced scanning technology and scientific research, this series journeys to the planet’s most remote, cold and inhospitable places to reveal great mysteries that were once frozen in time.

programme.title: Weird Or What? With William Shatner: Sea Lions, Voynich Manuscript, Cocaine Mummies
programme.desc: ...With William Shatner. Sea Lions, Voynich Manuscript, Cocaine Mummies: A look at a mysterious medieval manuscript and Egyptian mummies containing cocaine from Peru.
programme.sub-title: Sea Lions, Voynich Manuscript, Cocaine Mummies

programme.desc: ...With William Shatner. Dolphin Saviours, Grim Reapers, Hysterical Strength: A look at dolphin rescues, death-smelling pets and a skinny teen with unbelievable strength.

programme.desc: ...With William Shatner. Sailing Stones, Brown Mountain Lights, Super Human Runner: A look at Death Valley boulders, mysterious dancing lights and super-marathon runners.

programme.sub-title: Time Traveller, American Stonehenge, Plant Perception

programme.title: Weird Or What? With William Shatner: Lightning Strikes, Human Hibernation, Chinese Anchors
programme.desc: ...With William Shatner. Lightning Strikes, Human Hibernation, Chinese Anchors: A man survives six lightning strikes, while a toddler is frozen solid and thawed unharmed.
programme.sub-title: Lightning Strikes, Human Hibernation, Chinese Anchors

programme.title: Weird Or What? With William Shatner: Bullet Proof Boobs, Amazing Coincidences, Directional Cows

programme.desc: ...With William Shatner. Cellular Memory, Ice Circles, Chimera: Check out a heart patient's unbelievable transformation, circles of ice in rivers and a shocking DNA test.

programme.title: Weird Or What? With William Shatner: Power Of The Mind
programme.desc: Power of the Mind: A housewife has a strange and sudden vision that helps to solve a murder. A man remembers every single moment of his life.

programme.title: Weird Or What? With William Shatner: Ancient Mysteries
programme.desc: Ancient Mysteries: A girl finds a 1000-year-old skull that may prove aliens once walked the planet, and ancient stone carvings could rewrite the story of evolution.

programme.title: Weird Or What? With William Shatner: Amazing Survival

programme.title: Alien Files Unsealed: Episode 10

programme.desc: Mo is attracted to a classmate she is working with on a project.

programme.desc: Mo, Kim and Niecy decide to dress as “The Women of Batman” for Halloween.

programme.desc: Mo encourages CPQ to submit their latest song to the local radio station for their “play it or stuff it” segment. When the song is played, it is well received. Q has written lyrics over a Morris Day song, and Morris shows up at “The Hole” where he plays.

programme.title: Moesha: The Double Date
programme.desc: Mo has been dating Bridgewood classmate Jeremy since her break up with Q.

programme.title: Moesha: He Ain’t Heavy – He’s Dee’s Brother

programme.title: Moesha: The “Short” Story
programme.desc: Mo’s group at the Den includes a short kid known as “Biggie”.

programme.desc: A famous female broadcast journalist who used to be friends with Frank speaks at Bridgewood, so Mo invites her to their house for dinner.

programme.desc: Mo, Kim and Niecy play a game of “Truth or Dare”.

programme.desc: Mo asks Frank if she can go to a slumber party at Morgan’s house.

programme.desc: Moesha meets Brandy at a concert and we discover that Moesha is having a romance with Aaron, a college student.

programme.title: Moesha: Homecoming
programme.desc: With a little help from Myles and a visit from Grandma Mitchell, Moesha moves back home and returns to Crenshaw High.

programme.desc: Dee finds a joint in the couch while cleaning the house. Frank and Dee assume and accuse Mo, but Moesha is shocked when she catches Myles smoking.

programme.title: Moesha: Psyche Your Mind
programme.desc: Based on the family turmoil, the family begins counseling, but Moesha doesn’t want to air the family’s 'dirty laundry'.

programme.title: Moesha: Teacher
programme.desc: Moesha is attracted to a substitute teacher at Crenshaw. After they kiss, he leaves the school for 'personal reasons'.

programme.title: Moesha: I Know What You Did In The Third Grade
programme.desc: Moesha and her friends are stalked by a student who was just released from jail who they haven’t seen since the third grade when he got into trouble because of them. Parody of Brandy’s feature 'I Still Know What You Did Last Summer…'
programme.sub-title: I Know What You Did In The Third Grade

programme.title: Moesha: A Terrible Thing Happened On My Tour Of College
programme.desc: Moesha and her friends are invited to a college to attend a Prospective Freshman Weekend and someone slips a 'roofie' in her drink. Her boyfriend Aaron keeps her from being taken advantage of.

programme.title: Moesha: Birth Control
programme.desc: Moesha gets birth control pills when she decides she would like to lose her virginity to Aaron. However, things get complicated when Dee finds the pills in her purse.

programme.title: Moesha: A Class Act Christmas
programme.desc: Moesha, Hakeem, and the other employees of the Class Act are held hostage by a man dressed as Santa Claus protesting age discrimination.

programme.title: Moesha: The Crush
programme.desc: A friend of Myles who has a crush on Moesha pretends he cannot read so she can tutor him. However, after an article she writes about the success she has had with the little student is published in the LA Times, Moesha learns a hard lesson.

programme.title: Moesha: Barking Up The Wrong Tree
programme.desc: Hakeem accepts a job as assistant manager of the Class Act claiming there are financial difficulties at home. Moesha, concerned about his college education, confronts his mother who denies his claims.

programme.title: Moesha: Life Imitating Art
programme.desc: Racial tensions mount in Moesha’s high school after a mural depicting Latin American hero Caesar Chavez is purposely defaced.

programme.title: Moesha: OhMiGod, Fanatic
programme.desc: After Moesha and Kim have a huge fight, Moesha is surprised when MTV shows up at her door to film her bringing her best friend Kim to meet her favorite singer. Leanne Rimes guest stars.

programme.title: Moesha: The Rite Stuff
programme.desc: Moesha wants to boycott her debutante ball when she learns one of the girls is thrown out of the ceremony because she is pregnant.

programme.desc: Moesha is disappointed when she is not appointed valedictorian of her senior class. She discovers the boy who has been appointed is homeless.

programme.title: Moesha: Had To Be You
programme.desc: An old boyfriend of Andell’s comes back into her life and proposes to her. Moesha tries to keep Andell and Moesha’s Uncle Bernie together before it’s too late.

programme.title: Moesha: Independence Day

programme.title: Moesha: I Studied Twelve Years For This?
programme.desc: When Moesha’s car breaks down, she, Hakeem, and Niecy are late for their graduation ceremony.
programme.sub-title: I Studied Twelve Years For This?

programme.title: Moesha: Good Vibrations?
programme.desc: A frustrated Moesha longs for a promotion from 'gopher' to writer at Vibe magazine but believes that her boss, Joe Scott, would rather she pay her dues with something other than her writing talent.

programme.title: Royals And Their Pets
programme.desc: The Royal family has always had a very special relationship with their pets: from the lapdog who hid under Mary, Queen of Scots' skirts at her execution to Caesar, King Edward VII's terrier who took precedence over 9 Kings at his masters' State Funeral.

programme.title: Spying on the Royals: Part 1
programme.desc: The royal romance between Edward VIII and Wallis Simpson can now be seen through a unique new perspective: the eyes of those who spied on them, creating a secret dossier unlike any other.

programme.title: Spying on the Royals: Part 2
programme.desc: Newly declassified secret files reveal how King George VI and even the President of the United States ordered espionage on the former Edward VIII and Wallis Simpson, based on intelligence that Edward was attempting to usurp George VI.

programme.title: The Diana Story: Part I: The Young Princess
programme.desc: In the summer of 1980 a shy young girl arrives at Balmoral Castle, two years later that girl becomes a royal Princess. At just 20 years old Lady Diana Spencer married HRH Prince Charles to become HRH Princess Of Wales.

programme.title: The Diana Story: Part II: Broken Hearts
programme.desc: The marriage of Prince Charles and Princess Diana remains infamous for being one of the most turbulent royal weddings in modern history. As the cracks began to form the world watched.

programme.title: The Diana Story: Part III: Legacy of Love
programme.desc: A late-night phone call from Paris brought news that would rock the world. The sudden and tragic death of Princess Diana devastated millions. Hear what it was really like to be at the eye of the storm.

programme.title: To Diana With Love
programme.desc: A charmingly naive documentary made before the marriage of Princess Diana and Prince Charles hit the rocks looking at the young married couple as they enjoy their new life and their new young family both at home and on holiday.

programme.title: 50 Glorious Years: The Remarkable Marriage of the Queen and Prince Philip
programme.desc: Celebrating the Golden Wedding Anniversary of the Queen and Prince Philip, this programme is a sympathetic look at not only their lives together, but also an insight into Britain and the changes it has gone through in 50 Glorious Years.

programme.title: Diana: The People's Princess 20 Years On
programme.desc: Two decades after the death of Diana, Princess of Wales, the mere mention of her name is able to provoke emotion, reflection, and a flood of memories of a special person who formed a very special p...

programme.title: Mary Queen of Scots: The Red Queen
programme.desc: There are few women in history to have truly stood the test of time but the romance surrounding the ill-fated Mary Queen of Scots has ensured that her story lives on to intrigue and fascinate each new generation.

programme.title: Royal Upstairs Downstairs
programme.desc: Victoria stayed at Chatsworth House for four days in October 1932. Their host was the 6th Duke of Devonshire, one of the richest men in the land.

programme.title: Royal Upstairs Downstairs
programme.desc: Presenters Rosemary Shrager and Tim Wonnacott visit Shugborough Hall in Staffordshire following in the footsteps of Queen Victoria and her royal visits to the great and the good throughout her reign.

programme.title: Royal Upstairs Downstairs
programme.desc: Today’s visit to Harewood House in Yorkshire was made in 1835, two years before she became Queen, having learnt she would inherit the thrown four years earlier.

programme.title: Royal Upstairs Downstairs
programme.desc: Tim & Rosemary visit Holkham Hall in North Norfolk, as they retrace the steps of 16 year old Victoria on a two day visit there, in 1835, two years before she became Queen.

programme.title: Royal Upstairs Downstairs
programme.desc: Chef Rosemary Shrager and Antiques expert Tim Wonnacott visit The Royal Pavilion Brighton to reveal the story behind 19 year old Queen Victoria’s visit during the Christmas Holidays in 1838 – the year she became queen.

programme.title: Royal Upstairs Downstairs
programme.desc: Antiques expert Tim Wonnacott and chef Rosemary Shrager travel in the footsteps of Queen Victoria, our longest reigning monarch, visiting the houses, Castles and stately homes she visited throughout her life.

programme.title: Royal Upstairs Downstairs
programme.desc: Tim Wonnacott and Rosemary Shrager are at Walmer Castle in Kent in the footsteps of Queen Victoria who was 23 years old and had been queen for 5 years when she visited in November of 1842 with Albert and their two children.

programme.title: Royal Upstairs Downstairs
programme.desc: Tim Wonnacott and Rosemary Shrager travel in the footsteps of Queen Victoria to the castles and stately homes she visited throughout her life. Victoria visited Wimpole Hall in Cambridgeshire with Prince Albert in 1843.

programme.title: Royal Upstairs Downstairs
programme.desc: Antiques expert Tim Wonnacott and chef Rosemary Shrager visit Belvoir Castle in Rutland following in the footsteps of Queen Victoria who visited in 1843. She was 24, had been married for nearly four years and already had three children.

programme.title: Royal Upstairs Downstairs
programme.desc: Antiques expert Tim Wonnacott and chef Rosemary Shrager travel in the footsteps of Queen Victoria, our longest reigning monarch, visiting the houses, Castles and stately homes she visited throughout her life.

programme.title: Royal Upstairs Downstairs
programme.desc: Antiques expert Tim Wonnacott and chef Rosemary Shrager travel in the footsteps of Queen Victoria, our longest reigning monarch, visiting the houses, Castles and stately homes she visited throughout her life.

programme.title: Royal Upstairs Downstairs
programme.desc: Presenters Rosemary Shrager and Tim Wannocott visit Hatfield House in Hertfordshire to reveal the story of Queen Victoria’s visit there in 1846. Victoria was 27 years old and had been on the throne for 9 years.

programme.title: Royal Upstairs Downstairs
programme.desc: Presenters Rosemary Shrager and Tim Wonnocott visit Castle Howard in Yorkshire to follow in the footsteps of Queen Victoria and her tour of the country visiting the great and the good.

programme.title: Location, Location, Location: Glasgow
programme.desc: In Glasgow is first time buyer project manager and property obsessive Adam. With a budget of £250,000, he's looked at 500 properties in the 9 months!

programme.title: Location, Location, Location: Wicklow
programme.desc: This week we're helping a young mother achieve her dream of moving back to Ireland. Sue Wessell longs to return to the place where she grew up and has persuaded husband Chris and their two children to up sticks and relocate to the Emerald Isle.

programme.title: Location, Location, Location: Guildford
programme.desc: This week Kirstie and Phil are in Surrey on a quest to find dream homes for two sets of frustrated house hunters. Two very different budgets and briefs but with the property market raging it looks like they've taken on double the trouble.

programme.title: Location, Location, Location: Yorkshire
programme.desc: This week, we're back in Yorkshire catching up with lotto millionaires Roger and Lara Griffiths. Just over a year ago, this lucky pair scooped almost two million quid on the lottery and were desperate to splash out on a swanky new pad.

programme.title: Location, Location, Location: South Bucks
programme.desc: With both sets of house hunters determined to have it all, Kirstie and Phil are going to have to use all the tricks of the trade if they're going to help them move forward and hopefully into the house of their dreams!

programme.title: Location, Location, Location
programme.desc: The contestants must each serve one dish of their own creation, that features a spice, on the specially designed menu. Under the watchful eye of John, the amateurs will be challenged like never before to deliver dishes of an exceptional standard.

programme.title: Location, Location, Location: Home Counties
programme.desc: The home counties are the location for this weeks search. Phil is helping picky buyers Lysan and Bo leave the hustle and bustle of London and get back to their roots in Bedfordshire.

programme.title: Location, Location, Location: Tees Valley
programme.desc: First-time parents Nicola Moore and Tony Curry are desperate to find their first home where they can bring up 1-year-old son Lucas.

programme.title: Location, Location, Location: Bristol & Avon
programme.desc: This week they're in the South West of the country taking on two sets of hapless house hunters.

programme.title: Location, Location, Location: Oxfordshire
programme.desc: Our first set of house-hunters are the closest thing to all action heroes Phil and Kirstie have ever had.

programme.title: Location, Location, Location: East Midlands
programme.desc: Kirstie and Phil are back and busier than ever, as they attempt to find homes for two sets of house hunters with very different needs in an extremely challenging market.

programme.title: Location, Location, Location: South East England
programme.desc: One family is stuck in a house bursting at the seams and the other is stuck in one room at mum and dads. It's a quest for space-and it's up to Kirstie and Phil to make these searches blast off.

programme.title: Location, Location, Location: North Yorkshire
programme.desc: This week Kirstie and Phil's challenge is to find two very different properties in Yorkshire.

programme.title: Location, Location, Location: Sheffield
programme.desc: This week Kirstie and Phil are house hunting in Sheffield. Fire fighter Justin and his sales manager wife Deborah have got £250k burning a hole in their back pocket and they're desperate to find the perfect do-up property to settle down in.

programme.title: Location, Location, Location: Northampton
programme.desc: Despite a slowdown in the housing market, property is still very much headline news, and we love it! But, finding that all singing, all dancing dream home is tougher than ever!

programme.title: Location, Location, Location: Kent
programme.desc: 20-somethings Sophie and Niall are ready to buy their first place. They say they want something practical-but it soon becomes clear that for super-fussy Sophie- practical is no match for party pad.

programme.title: Location, Location, Location: Sutton Coldfield
programme.desc: Kirstie and Phil are kicking-off the series with one hell of a challenge, they're in Birmingham, house hunting for three generations of one family… one big house, for one big, extended family.

programme.title: Location, Location, Location: Buckinghamshire
programme.desc: Just a stone's throw from London, Buckinghamshire is the ideal location for two couples trying to combine high flying careers in the City, with the peace and quiet of small-town life for their young families.

programme.title: Location, Location, Location: Home Counties & North Yorks Revist
programme.desc: In Yorkshire, Trudi & Steve were moving to be closer to family-whilst in Luton, Zena wanted to get out of mum and dad's.

programme.title: Location, Location, Location: Harrow, Harts Revisits
programme.desc: Cautious first-time buyers Sundeep and Rupreet in Harrow-and Hitchin mad Hilary and Robin Hertfordshire-both had a serious case of postcode pickiness. But did either get what they wanted in the end?

programme.title: Location, Location, Location: Devon Revisits
programme.desc: Newlyweds Sam and Jamie needed Kirstie's help to start afresh in a new home. Whilst Geoff and Sharon were making the move to Torquay and needed to find a home big enough for them, their kids, and Sharon's mum!

programme.title: Running Wild With Bear Grylls: Bear Grylls, Julia Roberts
programme.desc: Movie star Julia Roberts joins Bear on a lifesaving Red Nose Day adventure in Kenya. They're on a two-day trek enduring blistering savannah temperatures.

programme.title: Running Wild With Bear Grylls: Bear Grylls, Deon Sanders
programme.desc: Bear Grylls takes NFL hall of famer Deion Sanders to the mesas and canyons of Utah for his first ever camping trip.

programme.title: Running Wild With Bear Grylls: Bear Grylls, Ben Stiller
programme.desc: Ben Stiller travels to Northern Scotland to face the Isle of Skye's rugged mountains. Stiller discusses his background while they navigate slippery terrain, searching for food and clean water.

programme.title: Running Wild With Bear Grylls: Bear Grylls, Channing Tatum
programme.desc: Channing Tatum hikes, explores and climbs during his expedition to Yosemite National Park. The pair begin with a helicopter ride, move through dense forest, then eat some dangerous food.

programme.title: Running Wild With Bear Grylls: Bear Grylls, Uzo Aduba
programme.desc: Uzo Aduba joins Bear on a harrowing journey to Spain's Pyrenees Mountains, where they face a poisonous viper and secure a dinner of field mice; Uzo shares the story of her path to fame and her family's emigration from Nigeria.

programme.title: Running Wild With Bear Grylls: Bear Grylls, Drew Brees
programme.desc: Bear Grylls ventures deep into Panama's Camino de Cruces jungle with Super Bowl winning quarterback Drew Brees, exploring caves and wrestling a six-foot crocodile.

programme.title: Running Wild With Bear Grylls: Bear Grylls, Ed Helms
programme.desc: Actor Ed Helms faces sheer cliffs, crumbling rock and a cringeworthy dinner menu while atop Colorado mountains; Helms discusses the road to his career in comedy.

programme.title: Running Wild With Bear Grylls: Bear Grylls, Michelle Rodriguez
programme.desc: Actress Michelle Rodriguez and Bear go to a desert Nevada; unexpected high winds during a sky-diving trip send Michelle off course; Michelle and Bear must come up with clever ways to stay hydrated.

programme.title: Running Wild With Bear Grylls: Bear Grylls, Scott Eastwood
programme.desc: Actor Scott Eastwood joins Bear on a journey through the harsh Bulgarian outback; the duo rappel from a towering arch, cross a raging river, descend into a dark cave and face off against a snake; Scott details growing up with his famous father.

programme.title: Running Wild With Bear Grylls: Bear Grylls, Tamron Hall
programme.desc: Tamron Hall's tenacious personality shines through as Bear pushes her to her limits.

programme.title: Running Wild With Bear Grylls: Bear Grylls, Shaquille O'Neal
programme.desc: Bear and NBA legend Shaquille O'Neal are lifted from a freight train via helicopter and whisked away to a dense forest in the remote Adirondacks; they face blood-sucking leeches, and a 200-foot rock face as they search for their exit.

programme.title: Running Wild With Bear Grylls: Bear Grylls, Lena Headey
programme.desc: Lena Headey and Bear journey through Spain's Iberian Peninsula; they rappel from a towering ridge, dine on bone marrow from a goat carcass and cross a lake using a makeshift raft during an unexpected storm; Lena details her life and rise to stardom.

programme.title: Running Wild With Bear Grylls: Bear Grylls, Keri Russell
programme.desc: Keri Russell and Bear journey through the Canary Islands; they dine on undigested seeds from a pigeon carcass, use a grappling hook and make a daring escape from a mountain peak using a paraglider; Keri discusses her family and path to fame.

programme.title: Running Wild With Bear Grylls: Bear Grylls, Jesse Tyler Ferguson
programme.desc: Actor Jesse Tyler Ferguson joins Bear on a 6,000-foot descent along the cliffs and ridges of Croda dei Toni; Ferguson shares insight about his sudden rise to fame.

programme.title: Running Wild With Bear Grylls: Bear Grylls, President Barack Obama
programme.desc: President Barack Obama and Bear Grylls explore the Alaskan wilderness, where they observe evidence of climate change, sample wild salmon and catkins tea made with water from melting glaciers; Obama discusses his official duties, parenthood and faith.

programme.title: Running Wild With Bear Grylls: Bear Grylls, Mel B
programme.desc: Spice Girl Mel B joins Bear on the two hundred foot cliffs of the Welsh coastline, where a final descent sends Mel into breakdown mode; Bear is stung by a jellyfish, forcing Mel to practice some first aid skills.

programme.title: Running Wild With Bear Grylls: Bear Grylls, Kate Hudson
programme.desc: Oscar-nominated actress Kate Hudson goes on a journey with Bear that involves a treacherous mountain range in Italy; Kate shares details of her unique upbringing.

programme.title: Running Wild With Bear Grylls: Bear Grylls, Zac Efron
programme.desc: Hollywood actor Zac Efron heads into the Appalachian wilderness of the Catskill Mountains in New York. They parachute into the woods, rappel down cliffs and search for shelter.

programme.title: Running Wild With Bear Grylls: Bear Grylls, Don Cheadle
programme.desc: Actor Don Cheadle joins Bear on a trek through the mountains of New England, which includes crossing a raging river and a climb to a towering railroad bridge. Bear considers a porcupine carcass for dinner.

programme.title: Running Wild With Bear Grylls: Bear Grylls, Courtney Cox
programme.desc: Actress Courteney Cox joins Bear to challenge herself into sharp edged discomfort amidst the jagged peaks and descending cliffs on the windswept coast of Ireland.

programme.title: Greatest Love Songs Of The Century: Maroon 5 / Calvin Harris Ft. Rihanna / Justin Bieber Ft. Daniel Caesar & Giveon / Jason Mraz / Lady Gaga / Beyoncé
programme.desc: She Will Be Loved (Maroon 5) / This Is What You Came For (Calvin Harris Ft. Rihanna) / Peaches (Justin Bieber Ft. Daniel Caesar & Giveon) / I'm Yours (Jason Mraz) / Always Remember Us This Way (Lady Gaga) / Beyoncé (Love On Top)
