programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Money On The Line
programme.desc: In the first episode of a two-part season finale, Gloucester's reigning Bluefin champion Dave Carraro, of FV-tuna.com, starts the fishing season with a $20,000 lead over his rival.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Endgame
programme.desc: With only three days left in the North Atlantic Bluefin Tuna season, the captains of Gloucester race against each other - and an oncoming storm - in the battle to land their final fish of the season.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: The Wicked Return
programme.desc: The fishermen of Gloucester, Massachusetts, set out for Jeffrey's Ledge in hopes of catching the first fish of the North Atlantic Bluefin Tuna Season.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Checkmate
programme.desc: It's week two of the North Atlantic Blue Fin Tuna Season and the Gloucester captains and their crews, from rookies to old pros, get put to the test.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Into The Storm
programme.desc: Bad weather threatens to end the fishing week for the Gloucester fishermen, but while some boats head for home, others decide to take on Mother Nature's wrath.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Operation T.U.N.A
programme.desc: As the hunt for blue fin tuna intensifies, the fisherman resort to espionage for information.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Bite Fight
programme.desc: It's the fifth week of the season and the entire fleet battle for the most successful fishing spots.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Mission: Fishin!
programme.desc: As Gloucester's Bluefin tuna fleet charges into the heart of the fishing season, it's a tight race for the coveted title of top-earning boat.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Bad Latitude
programme.desc: It's almost halfway through the North Atlantic bluefin tuna season and the Gloucester fleet has hit a lull in fishing.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Battle Royale
programme.desc: With the second half of the North Atlantic bluefin tuna fishing season now underway, competition amongst the Gloucester fleet intensifies when tuna become scarce.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Brotherly Shove
programme.desc: A new week calls for new techniques as the Gloucester Captains try unconventional methods to hook their next paycheck.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Blue Grit
programme.desc: Time is running out in the North Atlantic bluefin tuna season and, this week, every boat in the Gloucester fleet is facing a different challenge.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Tuna Beta Kappa
programme.desc: The tuna fishermen of Gloucester, Massachusetts, know that they have to rely on each other to get the job done, but sometimes trusting the competition isn't such a good idea.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Bad Blood
programme.desc: Three weeks left of bluefin tuna season, the Gloucester fleet is desperate to haul in a monster.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Sharks and Recreation
programme.desc: With only three weeks left in the North Atlantic Bluefin Tuna season, the pressure begins to take a toll on the captains.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: The Mighty Bite
programme.desc: With only two weeks left in the fishing season and the price of blue fin tuna on the rise, the Gloucester captains race to bring in record hauls.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: The Reckoning
programme.desc: There is only one week of fishing left in the North Atlantic Bluefin Tuna season and the Gloucester fleet is set for a final showdown in a bid to catch the last monster tuna of the year.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Head To Tail (Special)
programme.desc: It's a look back at the best moments from two seasons of Wicked Tuna, featuring the wildest catches and fiercest rivalries, plus a sneak peek at the upcoming third season.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: The Wicked Return
programme.desc: The fishermen of Gloucester, Massachusetts, set out for Jeffrey's Ledge in hopes of catching the first fish of the North Atlantic Bluefin Tuna Season.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Checkmate
programme.desc: It's week two of the North Atlantic Blue Fin Tuna Season and the Gloucester captains and their crews, from rookies to old pros, get put to the test.

programme.title: Conmen Case Files
programme.desc: Fake celebrity clairvoyant Williams preyed on the elderly by performing fake readings, including one where he directed his client to a forged will.

programme.title: 72 Hours: Nightmare
programme.desc: Every woman’s worst nightmare comes to life when a bearded sexual predator starts attacking women in the safety of their own apartments while they are sleeping.

programme.title: 72 Hours: Frenzy
programme.desc: Three bodies are found in a house, arms tied behind their backs. Stab wounds to the neck. Bloody footprints in the hall. A killing spree that leaves a woman, her boyfriend and a church deacon dead.

programme.title: 72 Hours: Vanished
programme.desc: A small town public school teacher fails to arrive for work for the first time in thirty years, leaving an empty house and a baffled community.

programme.title: 72 Hours: Secret Life
programme.desc: In Calgary, Alberta, a beautiful Ethiopian woman is found brutally strangled. The victim’s husband seems genuinely distraught over his wife’s death, but there is something strangely suspicious about him.

programme.title: 72 Hours: Double Cross
programme.desc: The investigation of the murder of a shady Montreal businessman takes detectives into the lurid underworld of drug dealers, con men, and crooked lawyers.

programme.title: 72 Hours: Dead End
programme.desc: A young couple hits the road, hitchhiking across North America. Free spirits keen to explore the world. When the young woman stops phoning home, her father is alarmed.

programme.title: 72 Hours: Betrayed
programme.desc: 19 year old Greg Parsons is convicted of brutally murdering his mother mainly on evidence of the audio tape of a song he'd written, "Kill your Parents".

programme.title: 72 Hours: The Violinist
programme.desc: Surgically clean body parts start turning up on a highway. Stranger still, they have been drained of every drop of blood.

programme.title: 72 Hours: Mad Bomber
programme.desc: In 1996 a serial bomber begins planting bombs in public places and terrorizes the Prince Edward Island community. The mystery person leaves a strange swastika as a calling card, eluding capture for eight years.

programme.title: 72 Hours: Kidnapped
programme.desc: A wealthy Asian girl is kidnapped in Vancouver. When the kidnappers make the fateful error of using the young girl’s cell phone, police are able to track their movements and capture the assailants.

programme.title: The Prosecutors: In Pursuit of Justice: Release Me
programme.desc: Release Me chronicles the story of Texas killer Kenneth Allen McDuff who received the death sentence in 1966 for a murderous rampage that left three teen-agers dead. He was paroled years later only to kill again.

programme.title: The Prosecutors: In Pursuit of Justice: Flames of Rage
programme.desc: When firefighters in suburban Indianapolis are called to a house fire, what they find inside shocks the entire community, a respected minister and his wife have been murdered with an ax.

programme.title: The Prosecutors: In Pursuit of Justice: The Missing Heiress
programme.desc: In February of 1977, Helen Vorhees Brach walked out of the famed Mayo Clinic in Minnesota, and into the pages of Chicago folklore. The wealthy widowed heiress of the Brach Candy fortune was never seen again.

programme.title: The Prosecutors: In Pursuit of Justice: Career Criminal
programme.desc: A loving mother disappears without explanation in Arlington, Texas. Investigators suspect foul play but search fruitlessly for any sign of her whereabouts.

programme.title: The Prosecutors: In Pursuit of Justice: An Unlikely Suspect
programme.desc: The community of Dover, Delaware is shocked when human body parts turn up throughout the city. Authorities determine that the remains are all from the same victim, but it will take the best forensic scientists in the country to make a positive ID..

programme.title: The Prosecutors: In Pursuit of Justice: Deadly Medicine
programme.desc: When the death rate at a rural Indiana hospital skyrockets, an investigation implicates a nurse, Orville Lynn Majors. State Police are left with a daunting task.

programme.title: The Prosecutors: In Pursuit of Justice: Silent Partner
programme.desc: Roy Radin was a successful New York theatrical producer with a knack for making money and a taste for the high life. His hopes for making it as a Hollywood producer ended abruptly in a remote canyon outside of Los Angeles.

programme.title: The Prosecutors: In Pursuit of Justice: Short Fuse
programme.desc: Robert Peernock was an expert in pyrotechnics who knew how to blow things up. But when he tried to kill his wife and daughter by rigging their car to explode, something backfired, and his daughter survived.

programme.title: The Prosecutors: In Pursuit of Justice: Infant Mortality
programme.desc: On the morning of January 23, 1994, a slumber party in Alvin, Texas becomes the scene of a terrible tragedy when 2 ½-year-old Renee Goode is discovered dead.

programme.title: The Prosecutors: In Pursuit of Justice: Green Widow
programme.desc: The Green Widow focuses on Mary Ellen Samuels, a woman whose lust for money and drugs led her to arrange for the 1988 murder of her husband, a successful Hollywood cameraman.

programme.title: Dr. G: Medical Examiner: A Cry for Help
programme.desc: Police patrolling the night streets hear gunshots and head to the scene. They find a nude middle-aged man in a parking lot lying face down in a puddle of blood.

programme.title: Dr. G: Medical Examiner: Deadly Destination
programme.desc: A retired businessman travels from England to Florida to visit his family but dies soon after arriving. Dr. G must now determine what mysteriously killed this healthy man so suddenly.

programme.title: Crime Stories: The Arbitrary Assassins
programme.desc: In November 1996, Raymond Collin went missing in his hometown of Timmins, Ontario. The discovery of his body days later in a snow-covered truck led police to an assortment of possible suspects.

programme.title: Crime Stories: The Slave Master
programme.desc: Several women went missing from the Kansas City area in the 1980s and 1990s.

programme.title: Crime Stories: The Silent Sniper
programme.desc: In March 1992 Claude Hawkins was shot dead while he was fishing in Ohio. Hawkins' murder mirrored multiple deaths in other nearby counties.

programme.title: Crime Stories: The Elusive Rapist
programme.desc: In the winter of 1968, the prairie city of Saskatoon is ravaged by a string of savage rapes.

programme.title: Crime Stories: Terror by Text
programme.desc: On a wintry morning in Sweden, Alexandra Fossmo, wife of pastor Helge Fossmo, was found shot to death in her bed.

programme.title: Crime Stories: The Human Hunter
programme.desc: Robert C. Hansen was known for his hunting abilities. In the early 1980s, however, his taste for hunting took a sinister turn.

programme.title: Crime Stories: The Menthol Murderer
programme.desc: A week-long search for a missing 10-yr-old Indiana girl ends sadly with her body being discovered in a nearby stream.

programme.title: Crime Stories: The Abducted Atheists
programme.desc: American Atheist Madalyn Murray O'Hair and her family vanished in August 1995, leaving behind an ominous note.

programme.title: Crime Stories: Ronald Glenn West: The 22 Caliber Killer
programme.desc: When two suburban housewives are killed in their homes within a week of each other in May 1970, it leaves Toronto in fear.
programme.sub-title: Ronald Glenn West: The 22 Caliber Killer

programme.title: Crime Stories: The Doctor of Death
programme.desc: When emergency services arrived at the office of respected neurologist Richard Boggs following the report of a patient's death, they had their suspicions regarding the circumstances...

programme.title: Crime Stories: Douglas Robert Worth: The Pictou Sadist
programme.desc: On December 11, 1987 a hard luck child living in a group home in Ontario was reported missing when she failed to return home from school.
programme.sub-title: Douglas Robert Worth: The Pictou Sadist

programme.title: Crime Stories: The Homocidal Drifter
programme.desc: In the city of Moncton, New Brunswick police discover the bodies of Joan Hicks and her 11-year-old daughter, Nina ‚Äì both brutally murdered late in the night.

programme.title: Crime Stories: The Bedroom Strangler
programme.desc: Women are being attacked in their beds at night. Police are baffled as to how this intruder is gaining access to apartments sometimes more than 15 stories up.

programme.title: Crime Stories: The Casebook Rapist
programme.desc: An international student is found raped and murdered in the bathroom of her high-rise apartment.

programme.title: Crime Stories: David Shearing: The Wells Grey Gunman
programme.desc: In August of 1982, six members of the Bentley/Johnson family disappear in the Wells Grey National Park without a trace.
programme.sub-title: David Shearing: The Wells Grey Gunman

programme.title: Crime Stories: Girls Just Wanna Get Found
programme.desc: Cindy Zarzycki is 13 years old when she goes missing on her way to a Detroit ice cream store.

programme.title: Crime Stories: The Lethal Injector
programme.desc: In 1996, nurses and patients at the Veteran's Affairs Medical Center in Northampton are concerned. It seems that wherever nurse Kristen Gilbert goes, death follows.

programme.title: World’s Most Evil Killers: Volker Eckert
programme.desc: Volker Eckert, a German truck driver, strangled and killed as many as nineteen women across Europe in a murderous career that lasted over thirty years.

programme.title: World’s Most Evil Killers: Joachim Kroll
programme.desc: Joachim Kroll murdered at least thirteen people during a span of over twenty years.

programme.title: Chopper Squad: Episode 8
programme.desc: The chopper team is responding to a life threatening emergency.

programme.title: GPs: Behind Closed Doors
programme.desc: Dr Kerali goes on a home visit to treat some open wounds.

programme.title: GPs: Behind Closed Doors
programme.desc: Stephen is homeless and suffers from insomnia.

programme.title: GPs: Behind Closed Doors
programme.desc: Patients include a faith healer who has a demonic attack.

programme.title: GPs: Behind Closed Doors
programme.desc: Sue has developed tremors in her hands and legs.

programme.title: Emergency Bikers: Episode 1
programme.desc: Cornwall paramedics are at full stretch. A sporty stag weekend goes horribly wrong for the husband to be, a teenage diabetic is slipping in and out of consciousness and a young mum is going into labour dangerously early.

programme.title: Emergency Bikers: Episode 3
programme.desc: In North Yorkshire a quick-thinking motorist has a narrow escape but still helps in the arrest of a drunk driverwho’s three times over the limit. And biker cop Smithy is then called to a crash between a biker and a driver.

programme.title: Emergency Bikers: Episode 6
programme.desc: In Portsmouth biker paramedic there’s a shocking case for Allan which will demand more than just medical know-how. And a cyclist’s memory loss is worrying in the aftermath of an accident.

programme.title: Emergency Bikers: Episode 1
programme.desc: Smashed bones on a building site, a biker doing a ton on one of the UK’s most dangerous roads, life-threatening seizures, a mystery identity to unravel and a smoker fighting for every breath.

programme.title: Emergency Bikers: Episode 3
programme.desc: In this week’s episode, Bristol biker paramedic Wingnut has a tough case on his hands. A woman is stuck in the mud on the banks of the river Avon.

programme.title: Emergency Bikers: Episode 4
programme.desc: In Cornwall, biker paramedic Iain Hooper fears the worst as he races to a man who’s fallen from the roof of his house and landed head-first on his van.

programme.title: Emergency Bikers: Episode 5
programme.desc: A suspected heart attack and a desperate search to try and find two riders who could be seriously injured are two cases facing Bristol biker paramedic Dean Wingnut Wiltshire.

programme.title: Emergency Bikers: Episode 6
programme.desc: There are a couple of medical mysteries for biker paramedic Dean Wingnut Wiltshire to solve. A woman has collapsed in the street, clutching her stomach and screaming in pain.

programme.title: Emergency Bikers: Episode 2
programme.desc: The emergency bikers risk their own lives as they race to save and protect others. In Birmingham the biker paramedics are on the frontline as they deal with the aftermath of football violence.

programme.title: Emergency Bikers: Episode 3
programme.desc: Steve Harris finds himself under attack when he goes to the rescue of a teenager in a fight.

programme.title: Emergency Bikers: Episode 5
programme.desc: Trained to deal with anything, the biker paramedics find themselves dealing with a suspected stroke when a fishmonger collapses at market, a man’s hit crossing the road

programme.title: Emergency Bikers: Episode 6
programme.desc: There's a report of a stabbing for Birmingham's biker paramedics. In Essex, a driver tries to sweet talk his way out of trouble.

programme.title: Ambulance: Code Red: Episode 3
programme.desc: Reports of a stabbing at a house party; a late night hunt for a man feared drowned.

programme.title: Ambulance: Code Red: Episode 1
programme.desc: The team cover everything from car crashes and stabbings.

programme.title: Helicopter ER: On the Way to School
programme.desc: A freak farm accident is caught on CCTV and the team is scrambled to rescue the three young victims. Paramedic Andy fights to save a five-year-old boy run over on his way to school and there's a tricky rescue in a ravine in the Dales.

programme.title: Scorpion: Dork Day Afternoon
programme.desc: Team Scorpion inadvertently crashes a bank robbery in progress and is taken hostage. Also, Sylvester's feelings for Florence grow.

programme.title: Scorpion: Gator Done
programme.desc: Team Scorpion heads to the bayou to track down a cagey alligator in order to stop a deadly mosquito-borne virus, and Paige teaches Walter the concept of the 'white lie.'

programme.title: Scorpion: Foul Balls
programme.desc: Team Scorpion must use their high IQs to win a softball game when the homeland director challenges, with all of their future government contracts on the line.

programme.title: Scorpion: Kenny and the Jet
programme.desc: Paige's maternal side goes into high gear when Team Scorpion must save an unconscious, a hypothermic boy stuck in the wheel well of their airborne airplane.

programme.title: Scorpion: A Lie in the Sand
programme.desc: Team Scorpion heads to Northeast Africa where they must carefully navigate a minefield in order to save the lives of local villagers.

programme.title: Scorpion: Pilot
programme.desc: When a crisis at LAX leaves dozens of airplanes unable to land, the government enlists a team of misfit geniuses to save the day.

programme.title: Scorpion: Single Point of Failure
programme.desc: The Governor calls on Team Scorpion when his daughter is mysteriously "bio-hacked" with a deadly virus and has only 24 hours to live.

programme.title: Scorpion: A Cyclone
programme.desc: Team Scorpion is determined to prove their worth when a bomber threatens to take out the internet infrastructure of the entire Southwest.

programme.title: Scorpion: Shorthanded
programme.desc: Team Scorpion heads to Las Vegas for a simple casino job, but a robbery leads to Walter's arrest and the rest of the team is left to clear his name.

programme.title: Scorpion: Plutonium Is Forever
programme.desc: To fix a Los Angeles nuclear reactor that's on the verge of a cataclysmic meltdown, Walter and the team must reluctantly enlist the help of a troubled former member.

programme.title: Scorpion: True Colors
programme.desc: Team Scorpion must pass a mandated psych evaluation or face being disbanded after they're accused of destroying a priceless work of art in an attempt to protect an art exhibit.

programme.title: Scorpion: Father's Day
programme.desc: A case gets personal for Team Scorpion when three convicts break out of prison and one of them is a brilliant hacker who was forced to help the others steal billions online.

programme.title: Scorpion: Risky Business
programme.desc: Team Scorpion enlists the help of a musician who created a controversial algorithm that generates hit songs to help find the murderer of a music blogger.

programme.title: Scorpion: Rogue Element
programme.desc: Team Scorpion must help protect Cabe's ex-wife after she uncovers evidence that suggests foul play in the death of a prominent congressman.

programme.title: Scorpion: Talismans
programme.desc: When a military plane is shot down in Bosnia, Team Scorpion must help recover its stealth technology before it falls into enemy hands.

programme.title: Scorpion: Revenge
programme.desc: When Sylvester accidentally triggers an explosive device during an investigation, Team Scorpion must focus on finding who's responsible even while their friend's life hangs in the balance.

programme.title: Scorpion: Dominoes
programme.desc: As Christmas approaches, Team Scorpion races to find a way to save a young boy's life after he gets trapped in a beachside cave and drowning is imminent.

programme.title: Scorpion: Kill Screen
programme.desc: Team Scorpion must help Ralph when the FBI questions him after his dark web game play inadvertently reveals the location of a CIA safe house and results in the murder of CIA operatives.

programme.title: Scorpion: Charades
programme.desc: Team Scorpion is tasked with uncovering a mole inside the CIA whose judgment is clouded by matters of the heart and is being coerced into stealing deadly chemicals.

programme.title: Scorpion: Forget Me Nots
programme.desc: Team Scorpion must jog the memory of an injured former Secret Service agent who is their only hope of preventing weapons of mass destruction being launched from a secret U.S. nuclear silo.

programme.title: Transformers: Armada: Rescue
programme.desc: With Starscream's help, the Autobots infiltrate the Decepticon moon base, attempting to rescue all the minicons Megatron has captured and forced into building a spaceship.

programme.title: Transformers: Armada: Mars
programme.desc: Alexis tracks a minicon in the vicinity of Mars. Starscream gets there first, but is disabled by Tidalwave. Jetfire rescues him: on the way back Starscream spots and tries to entice the minicon. But first they must get past Megatron.

programme.title: Transformers: Armada: Crack
programme.desc: With the kids befriending and welcoming him, the Autobots deeply suspicious of him, and driven by his need to kill Megatron, the deeply conflicted Starscream trusts Thrust and returns to the moon base with the Star Sabre and Skyboom Shield.

programme.title: Transformers: Armada: Threaten
programme.desc: Sabre, Shield and Blaster together create the Hydra Cannon. Installed on their new ship, the Decepticons test it on a comet - then Megatron orders Starscream to use it to destroy the Autobot base. Problem is, that'll also destroy the earth.

programme.title: Transformers: Armada: Crisis
programme.desc: Optimus and Jetfire attack the ship, but can't stop the Hydra Cannon being deployed. Optimus makes the ultimate sacrifice and takes the full blast. Afterwards only his minicon and his matrix are found, but at least earth survives.

programme.title: Transformers: Armada: Remorse
programme.desc: Hot Shot insists they should take vengeance on the Decepticons: Scavenger, with the support of the minicons, reminds him of their true purpose. With Hot Shot's realisation of the right way forward, Jetfire hands over command to him.

programme.title: Transformers: Armada: Depart
programme.desc: With the Autobot ship ready to leave, Hot Shot, supported by the rest of the team, refuse to let the children accompany them. But then the minicons refuse to allow the ship to depart unless the kids are on board.

programme.title: Transformers: Armada: Miracle
programme.desc: As the Axalon chases the Decepticon ship, hundreds of minicons appear. The 'Cons turn back to fight, and the 'Bots seem doomed, but the minicons resurrect Optimus.

programme.title: Transformers: Armada: Puppet
programme.desc: Hot Shot and Red Alert are sucked through a wormhole. The minicons guide the Axalon to their location, where they are all attacked by Nemesis Prime. As the planet breaks up, the 'Cons shoot down the Axalon and escape.

programme.title: Transformers: Armada: Uprising
programme.desc: The 'Bots reach Cybertron to find Megatron (now calling himself Galvatron) already winning the war. The minicons fend off an attack by Unicron, warning of great danger, but Galvatron believes it just an Autobot trick.

programme.title: Transformers: Armada: Dash
programme.desc: While the battle continues, Hot Shot goes to Cybertron to try to convince Galvatron of the impending danger. Thrust's true allegiance and agenda is revealed.

programme.title: Transformers: Armada: Drift
programme.desc: Thrust flees into the depths of Cybertron, pursued by Hot Shot and Wheeljack - and, separately, Starscream, who saves the children from being killed. The children discover the origins of the minicons.

programme.title: Transformers: Armada: Portent
programme.desc: Thrust joins Sideways by passing through a portal deep underground: his pursuers follow and find themselves on Cybertron's moon, which begins to disintegrate. To everyone's horror, Unicron is revealed.

programme.title: Transformers: Armada: Cramp
programme.desc: To convince Galvatron he must ally with Optimus to prevent Unicron taking over the universe, Starscream makes the ultimate sacrifice.

programme.title: Transformers: Armada: Alliance
programme.desc: With the Decepticons and Autobots allied, both armadas engage the planet-sized, transformed Unicron in battle in order to save Cybertron.

programme.title: Transformers: Armada: Union
programme.desc: The only way to defeat Unicron is to wake the minicons inside him and attack from within as well as without. Red Alert and the kids use the portal to travel to Unicron's core.

programme.title: Transformers: Armada: Origin
programme.desc: With the minicons protecting Cybertron and Hot Shot's team attacking Unicron from outside, and Optimus and Galvatron facing Sideways at Unicron's heart, the purpose and meaning behind the endless war is revealed.

programme.title: Transformers: Armada: Mortal Combat
programme.desc: With Unicron seemingly defeated, Galvatron insists on settling things with Optimus, and the fight wakes Unicron again. Galvatron makes the ultimate sacrifice to finally end the threat. Jetfire and Hot Shot return the children to earth.

programme.title: Transformers: Cybertron: Fallen
programme.desc: When Cybertron is threatened by a colossal black hole, Optimus Prime and the Autobots give the order to evacuate the planet. However, a mysterious stranger holds one last hope…

programme.title: Transformers: Cybertron: Haven
programme.desc: With the help of their human friends, the Autobots construct a new HQ on Earth, but will Megatron discover their secret base before it's finished?

programme.title: Transformers: Cybertron: Hidden
programme.desc: The Autobots attempt to blend in by assuming alternate transformation modes suitable for Earth. Meanwhile, the Decepticons engage human military forces, and the Autobots are forced to intervene.

programme.title: Transformers: Cybertron: Landmine
programme.desc: Landmine tries to adjust to life on Earth while recovering from the injury Starscream's null cannons inflicted on him.

programme.title: Transformers: Cybertron: Space
programme.desc: Bud is taken into space so he can see what the Earth is really like, but trouble occurs when he and Scattershot must be saved while the others are fighting against Thundercracker and Starscream.

programme.title: Transformers: Cybertron: Rush
programme.desc: Hotshot and Megatron race against Override in an attempt to win the first cyber planet key. Will either win when Crumplezone and Ransack are interfering?

programme.title: Transformers: Cybertron: Speed
programme.desc: Starscream plots how he can defend his title as Megatron's right-hand man while Thundercracker lures the Autobots into a trap. Meanwhile, Hot Shot tries another attempt to beat Override.

programme.title: Transformers: Cybertron: Collapse
programme.desc: Megatron searches for the Cyber Planet Key with extreme force, while the Autobots try to stop the massive earthquakes that are threatening the city.

programme.title: Transformers: Cybertron: Time
programme.desc: Red Alert becomes concerned at the desperate measures Hot Shot is taking to beat Override, while Vector Prime and the kids travel to the Sahara in search of the Omega Lock.

programme.title: Transformers: Cybertron: Search
programme.desc: The Autobots join Vector Prime to search for the Omega Lock, while Overhaul is left stranded by a surprise attack by Megatron and Starscream.

programme.title: Transformers: Cybertron: Deep
programme.desc: Overhaul and Megatron try to convince inhabitants of the Jungle Planet of their 'good' intentions, while the Autobots investigate the appearance of a new Atlantean symbol.

programme.title: Transformers: Cybertron: Ship
programme.desc: After the "Atlantis" ship disappeared, Optimus Prime and Megatron head to the moon where it's hiding while Vector Prime and the kids locate the Omega Lock.

programme.title: Transformers: Cybertron: Hero
programme.desc: Optimus discovers that Hot Shot has disobeyed his orders while Red Alert has covered for him. However, he is forced to put his trust into Hot Shot to win the Cyber Key from Override.

programme.title: Transformers: Cybertron: Race
programme.desc: Hot Shot and the Autobots battle Ransack and Crumplezone in the first round, while Starscream continues to build his forces when he recruits Mudflap and Lori and Bud uncover information on the Ancients' prehistoric visit to Earth.

programme.title: Transformers: Cybertron: Detour
programme.desc: As the race for the Speed Planet Cup continues, Hot Shot teaches Override the Autobots' code of honor, while Overhaul faces Scourge on the Jungle Planet.

programme.title: Transformers: Cybertron: Savage
programme.desc: Koby helps Hot Shot to train for the grueling next leg of the Speed Planet Cup, while Optimus Prime and Vector Prime answer a distress call from the Jungle Planet.

programme.title: Transformers: Cybertron: Sand
programme.desc: Hot Shot takes a dangerous gamble in the next round of the Speed Planet Cup, while Sideways tries to pit the Autobots against the Decepticons against each other...

programme.title: Transformers: Cybertron: Champion
programme.desc: After the terrible injuries sustained in the last race, Hot Shot cannot finish the final race on his own... Leaving Coby to enter the tournament as Hot Shot's driver.

programme.title: Transformers: Cybertron: Ice
programme.desc: Bud, Lori and Coby encounter government scientist Professor Suzuki while investigating strange phenomena at the North Pole, while Starscream plans a new attack.

programme.title: Transformers: Cybertron: Honor
programme.desc: Leobreaker disobeys Optimus' direct orders and attacks Scourge. Although Scourge now respects Leobreaker, the incident has caused a rift between him and Optimus...

programme.title: Transformers: Cybertron: Primal
programme.desc: Scourge and Optimus Prime battle each other for the Jungle Planet Cyber Key with Override from Speed Planet and Lori from earth being the guest viewers.

programme.title: Transformers: Cybertron: Trust
programme.desc: In an attempt to confuse the Decepticons, Optimus makes duplicate cyber keys for each Autobot. Meanwhile Dr. Suzuki makes an amazing discovery at the North Pole.

programme.title: Survivorman: Top Ten
programme.desc: Les reviews his experiences surviving in the wild. While counting down ten wilderness survival issues he has faced, he shows segments of both shows relevant to each item.

programme.title: Survivorman: The Lost Pilot Winter
programme.desc: Les Stroud's first time surviving for the cameras in the dead of winter. Les ventures to remote Northern Ontario to endure temperatures of -40 degrees F for a week alone.

programme.title: Survivorman: Survivorman & Son Tofino
programme.desc: Les and his 16-year-old son Logan find themselves trapped without supplies and without a way home while sea kayaking along the coastline of British Columbia.

programme.title: Survivorman: Mystery of Bigfoot Mountain
programme.desc: Les ventures into the most remote and dangerous grizzly bear territory of the Canadian Rockies in his search for Sasquatch. In this vast and unexplored forest, anything could be out there. Can Les capture definitive proof of Bigfoot?

programme.title: Survivorman: Survival Challenge
programme.desc: Les takes a group of NHL hockey players out to the wilderness to see if they have what it takes to survive.

programme.title: Survivorman: Costa Rica
programme.desc: Marooned on Costa Rica's Osa Peninsula, Les "Survivorman" Stroud has only a few items to aid him for the next 7 days: swimming goggles, 3 ballpoint pens, a multi-tool and the clothing on his back.

programme.title: Survivorman: Portland Oregon
programme.desc: Les goes to a secret location just outside of Portland, Oregon with his friend and filmmaker Devon Massyn in search of Bigfoot.

programme.title: Survivorman: Arctic Tundra
programme.desc: In the land of the midnight sun, Survivorman heads in to 72°.46 N – the northern tip of Baffin Island. On-route the boats are surrounded by a pod of orca.

programme.title: Survivorman: Australian Outback
programme.desc: Forced to land his ultralight aircraft due to a miscalculation in fuel, Survivorman is once again out to endure the elements for seven days in this spectacular locale… the Australia Outback.

programme.title: Survivorman: Tonga
programme.desc: Les strands himself on a deserted island in the archipelago of Tonga with a long-time friend to relive the story of marooned sailors.

programme.title: Survivorman: Arizona Desert
programme.desc: Riding a dirt bike out into the official middle of nowhere, Les simulates a break-down scenario. Half a gallon of water, a snack bar and his multi-tool are all he has with him for the next 7 days.

programme.title: Survivorman: Temagami Forest
programme.desc: Les returns to the oldest mountain ranges in North America, The forests of Ontario's Temagami, to survive for ten days with no food, no water, no shelter, no safety and no camera crew. Facing the dangers of packs of wolves and vigilant moose.

programme.title: Survivorman: Grenada Jungle
programme.desc: Les treks through the thick mountain rainforest to survive on the peak of Grenada's largest active mountain. Mona Monkeys, tarantulas, scorpions, armadillo, parrots and possums all live in this vibrant ecosystem, offering an abundance of food and danger.

programme.title: Survivorman: Fighting To Survive
programme.desc: Les Stroud, TV's Survivorman, will teach Elias the ways of survival. However, he won't teach him everything he needs to know.

programme.title: Survivorman: The Hidden World
programme.desc: Les plants himself in Bigfoot hot spots across North America, collecting stories and experiences from Bigfoot believers, gathering and examining evidence to debunk the mysteries that surround this ancient legend.

programme.title: Survivorman: Incan O'ero High Priests
programme.desc: Les and crew climb to 16,000 ft up dangerous Mt. Sinkara to join 80,000 indigenous Andeans as they make their yearly pilgrimage to the holy site of Qollorit'i.

programme.title: Survivorman: Where the Myth Began
programme.desc: Les tracks Bigfoot in the ancient red cedar forests of northwest California. This Sasquatch hotspot is renowned for reports of Bigfoot, and the forest is crawling with black bears. Will Les brave its dangers and catch Sasquatch on camera?

programme.title: Survivorman: Papua New Guinea
programme.desc: Through the perilous jungle Survivorman treks deep, with the help of a couple of local guides. Led off the beaten path he is deserted alone in this primordial landscape.

programme.title: Survivorman: Oregon
programme.desc: Survivorman Legends tells the real life stories of people who survived: those who suffered terribly but made it through and those who died trying.

programme.title: Survivorman: Georgian Swamp
programme.desc: The swamplands of Georgia's Altamaha River Basin are all that one would expect of a primordial bog; dank, menacing, swimming with slithering creepy crawlies and of course, alligator infested.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: Residents of Noel, Missouri were stunned to learn that their bank had been robbed and the bank president was missing. His body was later found floating in a lake, securely bound to a chair with duct tape. That duct tape would help solve the crime.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: A husband is shot and killed during a camping trip and his wife tells two different versions of events which led to his death. Forensic psychiatry enables her to distinguish fact from fiction and evidence helps determine what really happened.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: The body of a 16-year-old girl was discovered nine months after she disappeared. Forensic scientists found clues that painted a virtual portrait of her killer. They knew he had a dog, worked for the postal service, and had red carpeting in his home.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: A young woman fell to her death from a cliff overlooking the Pacific Ocean. Initially, investigators thought it was a tragic accident. But after a forensic exam of photos taken at the scene, police had a different picture of what had happened.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: Haunted by the disappearance of her mother some twenty years earlier, a young woman began her own investigation. In the cold case file, she discovered her mother's diary and a dark family secret which might have been the reason her mother vanished.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: Police had several suspects in the robbery and brutal murder of an elderly couple. Unfortunately, the evidence was inconclusive and the crime went unsolved. Ten years later, a forensic scientist not only solved the crime, he also made history.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: After a street fight took the life of a national wrestling champion, a jury decided it was murder, and sentenced the accused to a minimum of twenty years in prison. Years later, he's granted a new trial, where a forensic animator tells another story.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: A 19-year-old girl was found dead in her car, and the scene had been staged to make murder appear to be suicide. During their investigation, police discovered the victim was involved in a love quadrangle, giving several people a motive to kill her.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: A man disappeared one year to the day after beginning an affair with his friend's wife. 15 years later, with the help of a metal detector, police found evidence which would prove what had happened, and who was responsible.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: The body of a California co-ed is found under an Interstate ramp, and San Diego police have no idea who would want her dead. Their questions could be answered when they discover a tiny, unique fibre on the victim's clothing.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: A go-go dancer tells her family she needs to get away and vanishes for twenty years. A phone call out of the blue reveals the real story.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: A Colorado hunter is shot three times and killed. Analysis of the bullets leads the investigation to look very close to home.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: A community is rocked by the death of a well-respected nurse in a car accident, but seed pods in her hair suggest something sinister.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: When a woman disappeared without a trace, there were two possible explanations: kidnap or murder. Concern was heightened when police learned that two other women had vanished under similar circumstances.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: Hikers near Anchorage, Alaska discovered a body wrapped in sheets, which were edged in orange stitching. Clinging to the sheet were threads of evidence, which led straight to the killer.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: The news of a flight attendant's brutal murder prompted the son of a victim who had been killed five years earlier to contact police. The MO of both murders was remarkably similar.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: A two-man shrimp boat sinks when a fast-moving, a violent storm strikes the Louisiana coast, and a deckhand is considered a hero for trying to save the drowned captain, until his body is found.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: When a wealthy real estate tycoon went missing, it appeared to be foul play. He had been aware that he was in danger. In his will, he left instructions regarding what was to happen if he died under violent circumstances.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: The cold-blooded murder of an American tourist in a Mexican resort focused law enforcement resources on both sides of the border.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: The investigation of the kidnapping of a prominent banker's wife led police on a wild goose chase, tracking down disgruntled bank customers and examining computer fonts.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: A man has no recollection of stabbing his wife, pushing her into the swimming pool and holding her head under the water.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: A house erupted in flames on a cold January night, killing one person and injuring another. The survivor blamed a kerosene heater. The evidence at the scene did not support her story, and she was charged with arson and murder.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: In 1957 a man committed a number of crimes in one night. 50 years later with new and improved technology, police were able to prove their case.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: Investigators piece together tiny clues at the scene of a hit-and-run accident. Their findings help to track down the offending driver.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: When an elderly couple dies in a house fire, police suspect their son to be the culprit. Will further investigation reveal the truth?

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: Police instigated an intense search when the mother of two children went missing and, less than a day later, they found her body. How did forensics help detectives?

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: Some skeletal remains and a single red hair of a woman are found in a remote area. Investigators use forensic science to identify the victim and killer.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: When a woman went missing on holiday, all police found was her shoes. Video evidence suggested there might be a killer afoot.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: A woman is found dead in bed with a gun in hand and suicide notes close by. It looks like suicide, but curious evidence suggests otherwise.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: Investigators must piece together fragments of a computer disc to discover who murdered the wife of a serviceman in the Philippines.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: When a man was murdered in a bomb blast, investigators must sift through shards of evidence to hone in on the perpetrator.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: The wife of an Air Force officer was found dead in her bed, with a plastic laundry bag near her face. See how did the forensics team piece together this limited evidence.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: Police search for a missing boy. First they find his backpack, then his body, but can they track down the killer?

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: When police arrive at the scene of a car accident, the bloody mess they find leads them to suspect foul play.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: Two victims are found in an irrigation canal and questions are asked as to whether a killer can be caught if the evidence is washed away. Police turn to nearby footprints for answers.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: In the light of day, a DNA picture painted by a molecular biologist and new clues are revealed about a traffic accident during the night.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: Real crimes are solved using medical techniques. When a security guard disappeared it took a year to find his body.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: When three students are brutally murdered close to campus, investigators must determine what the women had in common before their serial killer strikes again.

programme.title: Mega Builders: King of Container Ships
programme.desc: 3000 shipyard workers build the World's Biggest Container Ship in the biggest little shipyard around, in Odense, Denmark.

programme.title: Mega Builders: Roller Coaster
programme.desc: At Six Flags Magic Mountain the worlds longest, fastest and tallest Flying Roller Coaster is under construction. If the Park can't get the ride up and ready for the Spring break crowds 2007 this 21 million dollar investment won't be worth a penny.

programme.title: Mega Builders: Quake-Proof Bridge
programme.desc: Six years after piles were pounded into the muddy bottom of San Francisco Bay the new Bay Bridge is about to be topped off. In March the final segment on the 525 foot tall central tower will be hoisted into place.

programme.title: Mega Builders: London Olympic Aquatics Centre
programme.desc: A group of engineers in England and Wales has taken on the biggest challenge of the next Summer Olympic Games -- the construction of a complex steel-truss roof for the new Aquatics Centre.

programme.title: Megastructures: China's Smart Tower
programme.desc: Take 60,000 tons of steel, 260,000 cubic meters of concrete, 2,000 dedicated Chinese workers, and some of the best design brains in the business, and the Shanghai World Financial Center is what you get.

programme.title: Megastructures: World's Tallest Tower
programme.desc: Building one of the world’s tallest TV towers, the Guangzhou Sightseeing and TV Tower (now called the Canton Tower).

programme.title: Megastructures: Shanghai Super Tower
programme.desc: Typhoon winds to withstand, a rigid deadline to meet, and a towering goal no skyscraper has ever reached. The Pearl River Tower even generates its own power; it is the holy grail for mechanical engineers.

programme.title: Megastructures: China's Ultimate Port
programme.desc: In 2002 Chinese engineers and workers tackled one of the biggest construction projects on Earth. Thirty kilometers out to sea, in the middle of the ocean, is the location for Yangshan Deep Water Port.

programme.title: Megastructures: Bejing Water Cube
programme.desc: China has erected some of the greatest monuments on Earth. When they held the Olympic Games in Beijing, the main stadium was a feat of architectural beauty. It was up to engineers to design the Beijing Water Cube to match it.

programme.title: Mega Builders: Blockbuster Bridge
programme.desc: In South Korea engineers are fighting against the forces of the wild West Sea to build the Incheon Grand Bridge. It’s part of a visionary plan to link the biggest airport in the nation, with a new international investment zone called New Songdo.

programme.title: Mega Builders: Madrid's Big Dig
programme.desc: Under a sweltering sun in the heart of Madrid, Spanish construction workers are working non-stop on the job of a lifetime, the M-30 Madrid project. At a cost of 3.7 billion Euros it is the largest urban tunneling system ever undertaken.

programme.title: Mega Builders: Hard Rock Park
programme.desc: In Myrtle Beach, South Carolina a team of engineers have just one year to build the world’s first Rock and Roll theme park, Hard Rock Park.

programme.title: Mega Builders: Bangkok Bridge
programme.desc: The new 13-km Industrial Ring Road will be a combination of elevated roads, bridges and tunnels, designed to help ease the congestion in Bangkok.

programme.title: Mega Builders: Spanning the Saigon River
programme.desc: In Ho Chi Minh City (formerly known as Saigon), engineers are on a mission to modernize. Construction is underway to raise Phu My Bridge, a brand-new $100 million cable-stayed bridge.

programme.title: Mega Builders: World Class Stadium
programme.desc: South Africa has a lot riding on being the host of the next FIFA World Cup. It's important and prestigious. Cape Town is building a brand-new stadium for the occasion - with a challenging high-tech roof.

programme.title: Mega Builders: Glitz City
programme.desc: In Las Vegas -- the quintessential city of razzle-dazzle and bling -- MGM is going for the ultimate one-upmanship.

programme.title: Mega Builders: Sheikh Zayed Bridge
programme.desc: Building the Sheikh Zayed Bridge, the stunning grand gateway to the world's richest city, Abu Dhabi, capital of the United Arab Emirates, is a king size headache for Mark Jones, the engineer assembling its giant signature arches.

programme.title: Mega Builders: Ice Hotel: Bigger, Colder
programme.desc: Building an eighty-room hotel of snow and ice in just six weeks every year isn’t a big problem for Ake Larsson, but the weather certainly is.

programme.title: Giant Constructions: Railway Bridges
programme.desc: Railway bridges fascinate through different construction methods from masonry, truss-beam bridges to steel-concrete arch bridge. Heavier loads, faster speeds, more frequently: trains speed over bridges and the maintenance teams face ever larger challenges

programme.title: Wardens: Snowmobiles and Moose
programme.desc: Michigan conservation officers in districts 1 and 5 check out snowmobilers and ice anglers. Also, a look into trying to get an accurate moose count from a plane and conservation officers who help to gather toys for children for Christmas.

programme.title: Wardens: Fish and Turkeys
programme.desc: Michigan Conservation Officers patrol salmon fishermen, another CO shares his turkey hunting expertise with a hunter safety class, and a look into the DNR's efforts to place bands onto geese.

programme.title: Wardens: Trespassing for Deer
programme.desc: Two Michigan conservation officers in the southern part of the state investigate a case of deer carcasses they found near some railroad tracks. Also, a look at an opportunity for veterans and first responders to hunt pheasants.

programme.title: Wardens: Bears and Water
programme.desc: Two Michigan conservation officers, one in the southwest part of the state and the other in the northeast, check on waterfowl hunters. One of them also investigates illegal bear baits.

programme.title: Wardens: October Patrols
programme.desc: One Michigan conservation officer checks on waterfowl hunters while another observes salmon anglers during the busy fall spawning run. Also, the state works to move a historical building away from a receding lakeshore.

programme.title: Wardens: Ice, Ice Fishing
programme.desc: Michigan conservation officers check on ice anglers and snowmobilers in both the Lower and Upper Peninsula. The state also teams up with with local musicians to create a sound track that includes sounds from nature.

programme.title: Wardens: Deer and Hockey
programme.desc: Michigan conservation officers patrol on the opening day of firearm deer season as well as later in deer season.

programme.title: Wardens: Group Patrols
programme.desc: Michigan conservation officers in the middle part of the state team up to run patrols in both the fall and the winter for deer season as well as snowmobiling and ice fishing seasons.

programme.title: Wardens: Honoring Tuskegee Airmen
programme.desc: Michigan conservation officers assist maritime archeaologists and divers as they explore, investigate, and document the wreckage of a plane from a 1944 crash. Other officers patrol walleye anglers in the state's Upper Peninsula.

programme.title: Wardens: Elk, Hot and Cold
programme.desc: Michigan conservation officers patrol during the state's early and late elk seasons. Also, a blind hunter has a coveted bear tag donated to him.

programme.title: Wardens: Ice Fishing Can Be Cold
programme.desc: Michigan conservation officers in two different districts patrol ice anglers and snowmobilers in frigid conditions. Also, a DNR state park employee shares some of her personal travel adventures.

programme.title: Wardens: Archery and Firearm Deer
programme.desc: Michigan conservation officers in the southwest corner and south-central part of the state patrol deer hunters during the archery and firearm seasons. Also, a look into generous donations of food from hunters.

programme.title: Random Breath Test
programme.desc: A reality show on real alcohol and drug testing performed on Australian roads by the Police's RBT Squad.

programme.title: Behind Bars The Worlds Toughest Prisons: Miami, Dade County Jail Boot Camp, Miami, Florida, USA
programme.desc: The toughest divisions of the Miami Dade: Boot Camp gives minor offenders a chance to escape the prison through unforgiving drills and rules. To many it is a better alternative to The M-D County Jail where murderers and rapists have their own rules.
programme.sub-title: Miami, Dade County Jail Boot Camp, Miami, Florida, USA

programme.title: British Gangsters: Faces of the Underworld: Live By The Sword
programme.desc: Bernard O'Mahoney explores the injustices suffered by those who have unwittingly surrounded themselves with criminals. Do these people always deserve the harsh legal consequences and should society turn its back on them for their mistakes?

programme.title: British Gangsters: Faces of the Underworld: Die By The Sword
programme.desc: Continuing from episode 5, Bernard O'Mahoney explores the potential injustices suffered by those who have unwittingly surrounded themselves with criminals.

programme.title: Cops Uncut UK: Episode 11
programme.desc: With candid dashboard camera footage of bungled arrests, kamikaze crooks and cop-based carnage of all shapes and sizes, Cops Uncut is the ultimate American police trooper blooper reel.

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Mercury Retrograde
programme.desc: As the other rookies hunt down a dangerous escaped convict, Swarek drags Andy through his undercover hauntson a mission he won’t explain. At first, Andy assumes Swarek is a rogue cop trying to settle scores from his undercover days.

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Fite Nite
programme.desc: While working on a high-stakes gun raid, Andy and Gail stumble upon a victim of domestic abuse whose brutal experience in the system has taught her not to trust the police.

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Signals Crossed
programme.desc: Andy’s undercover skills are tested –and found to be lacking –during a citywidecampaign to clean up the streets, whenshe’s tapped to pose as a prostitute in order to arrest unsuspecting johns.

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Broad Daylight
programme.desc: A home invasion at an upscale address leads to a massive first response call that brings out the training officers in full force. After the scene is cleared, Andy and Traci remain behind with the terrified homeowner.

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Bullet Proof
programme.desc: Andy’s romance with Det. Luke Callaghan gets complicated when he chooses her for a special assignment -serving a search warrant for a bullet lodged in the head of a witness to murder.

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Hot & Bothered
programme.desc: A severe heat wave wreaks havoc on the city, forcing the rookies to work around the clock to keep the peace. In the midst of the chaos, Andy discovers that a serial rapist may have resurfaced to prey on vulnerable teenage girls.

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Honour Roll
programme.desc: After their High School Outreach assignment goes awry, Andy and Chris stumble on the victim of avicious beating behind a nightclub.

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Girlfriend of the Year
programme.desc: After a routine speed trap leads to a messy accident on a city highway, Chris and Gail find one of the cars mysteriously empty and quickly realize that itslicense plate matches the one being broadcast in a citywide “Amber Alert”

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Big Nickel
programme.desc: Andy’s attempt to avoid Swarek is thwarted whenbothare assigned to a prisoner transport. When things go awry and theinmate breaks loose, the two officers are led on a cat-and-mouse foot chase through the meandering woods.

programme.title: Rookie Blue: To Serve or Protect
programme.desc: What was to be a routine day for Andy is abruptly put on holdwhen herex-copper father, Tommy, confesses that he might have committed a serious crime during one of his alcohol-induced blackouts

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Judgment Day
programme.desc: There’s a nervous tension in the air on Judgment Day for all therookies at 15 Division who will have to undergo make-or-break assessments by Staff Sergeant Frank.

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Takedown
programme.desc: Andy and Chris accidentally screw up one of the biggest drug busts of the decade when they arrest one of the players. In an effort to save the operation, Swarek and Andy go undercover to make the drug buy.

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Butterflies
programme.desc: Andy's world explodes when a fresh-faced university student is killed in a random shooting, and a bullet hits Andy, lodging in her vest.

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Might Have Been
programme.desc: Everyone's living their “might-have-beens.” Andy and Gail go undercover as cocktail waitresses to clean up a drug-infested club, but get more than they bargained for.

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Bad Moon
programme.desc: As a full moon hangs over the city, the rookies are unnerved by a series of strange occurrences. While investigating the theft of three severed heads, Andy and Swarek pick up the trail of a mentally unstable man who has stopped taking his medication

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Heart & Sparks
programme.desc: As 15 Division recovers from the shooting of Det. Luke Callaghan, a series of arsons culminates in the torching of a laundromat – and the rookies are forced to confront their own burning issues.

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Stung
programme.desc: Using a local car dealership, 15 Division runs a sting operation to crack down on suspects with outstanding warrants. One of the criminals they capture tries to bargain for a lighter sentence

programme.title: Rookie Blue: In Plain View
programme.desc: When a police informant is found murdered, 15 Division sets its sights on finding a weak link in the notoriously brutal East Jameson gang. Andy has to work closely with Detective Jo Rosati, a woman who seems far too interested in Andy’s fiancé, Luke.

programme.title: Rookie Blue: The One That Got Away
programme.desc: When a woman gets brutally attacked in the same manner as deceased rookie cop Zoe Martinelli. Det. Luke Callaghan is convinced that it’s the same suspect.

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Monster
programme.desc: After a seemingly drunken man collapses in the barn, 15 Division is put under quarantine. Andy and Swarek work together to find the accomplice of a dyed blue bank robber

programme.title: Nine Lives
programme.desc: A workaholic billionaire (Kevin Spacey) tries to communicate with his family when a bizarre turn of events traps him inside the body of a cat named Mr. Fuzzypants.

programme.title: Against the Wild
programme.desc: Two siblings and their dogs become lost in the wilderness and combine their skills to survive.

programme.title: Ride Like a Girl
programme.desc: Michelle Payne, first female jockey to win Melbourne Cup.

programme.title: Nine Lives
programme.desc: A workaholic billionaire (Kevin Spacey) tries to communicate with his family when a bizarre turn of events traps him inside the body of a cat named Mr. Fuzzypants.

programme.title: Against the Wild
programme.desc: Two siblings and their dogs become lost in the wilderness and combine their skills to survive.

programme.title: Ride Like a Girl
programme.desc: Michelle Payne, first female jockey to win Melbourne Cup.

programme.title: Megan Leavey
programme.desc: Young Marine Cpl. Megan Leavey starts to identify with Rex, a particularly aggressive combat dog that she trains. Together, they complete more than 100 missions until an improvised explosive device injures both, putting their fates in jeopardy.

programme.title: Rememory
programme.desc: An amateur sleuth steals a machine that can extract, record and play the memories of another person. He uses the device to try and solve the mysterious death of the man who invented it.

programme.title: Destroyer
programme.desc: As a young cop, Erin Bell went under cover to infiltrate a gang in the California desert -- with tragic results. When the gang leader re-emerges, Bell embarks on an obsessive quest to bring him to justice and make peace with her tortured past.

programme.title: Mutant X
programme.desc: A New Mutant is kidnapped from his family, and Mutant X sets out to recover him and find out what Eckhart's interest in him is.

programme.title: Mutant X
programme.desc: When a plague that only affects mutants is raging, Adam and Eckhart agree to work together to find a cure.

programme.title: Mutant X
programme.desc: Eckhart seeks a mutant who can absorb energy, one who Brennan becomes romantically involved with.

programme.title: Mutant X
programme.desc: Jesse falls in love with a computer hacker, who Eckhart wants to "procure" in order to corrupt the public computer news channels against New Mutants...and to the GSA's benefit.
programme.sub-title: In the Presence of Mine Enemies

programme.title: Flash Gordon Conquers the Universe: Freezing Torture
programme.desc: Flash Gordon, Dale Arden and Dr. Zarkov return to the planet Mongo for an antidote to the Purple Death, which wreaking destruction on Earth. However, Ming the Merciless has other plans for them.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict: Miracle
programme.desc: Boone helps prevents a suicide of a handless girl. Da'an wants to use revolutionary Taelon technology to help the girl for propaganda reasons.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict: Avatar
programme.desc: Boone and Marquette must find James Pike, a mysterious escaped serial killer who rose from the dead.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict: Old Flame
programme.desc: While plutonium is stolen from a nuclear plant, Boone is is having a tough time concentrating. His mind is on Elyse Chapel, a famous musician and old flame.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict: Float Like a Butterfly
programme.desc: Elijah Good, a doctor from an Amish community, asks Boone for help with some unexpected deaths. They might have to do with a Taelon-related disease.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict: Resurrection
programme.desc: Doors makes a public appearance, leading to an increase in anti-Taelon sentiment. The Taelon Synod is fed up with Da'an and sends Zo'or in his stead.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict: Horizon Zero
programme.desc: A high profile mission to Mars is suddenly canceled, much to the dismay of the public. Involved air force captain Paul Chandler steals Lili's shuttle.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict: Scopions Dream
programme.desc: Dr. Larry Clark is a bio engineer who works on the skrills. When the companions decide to get rid of a series, one of them joins with Clark.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict: Live Free or Die
programme.desc: Navy Seal major Raymond McIntyre kidnaps Da'an and demands to know where his men are. They were involved in a inter-dimensional space flight test that went wrong.

programme.title: The Lost World: Out of Time
programme.desc: Marguerite, the reincarnation of the Druid's priestess, must fulfill her destiny by retrieving emeralds that will save them. Veronica has difficulty giving up a baby she has grown attached to.

programme.title: The Lost World: Paradise Found
programme.desc: While searching for Veronica's parents, the explorers find themselves in a hidden land of paradise. They must resist temptation when they discover a magical fruit that promises immortality.

programme.title: The Lost World: The Beast Within
programme.desc: Malone goes after a healer that's been filled with the spirit of a demon in exchange for safe release from the village. The girls must set their differences aside and learn to trust each other.

programme.title: The Lost World: Creatures of the Dark
programme.desc: Challenger tries to convince an underground civilization of the dangers of an active volcano ready to blow. In the meantime Veronica, Roxton, and Summerlee try to outrun the Vantu.

programme.title: The Lost World: Tribute
programme.desc: Challenger, Roxton, and Veronica teach the Tintas how to retaliate against the Hikari so that they may be independent. Meanwhile Marguerite, Summerlee, and Malone help a WWI pilot fix his plane.

programme.title: Sanctuary: Kali Part 1
programme.desc: Reports start coming in from Sanctuaries around the world of unusually violent and erratic behaviour from their most docile Abnormals.

programme.title: Sanctuary: Kali Part 2
programme.desc: After finding Will in a Dharavi warehouse just barely alive, Magnus, Kate and Ravi, rush him back to the Mumbai Sanctuary for emergency treatment.

programme.title: Sanctuary: Kali Part 3
programme.desc: The season three opener finds the Sanctuary team desperately trying to find a way to reach Kali to prevent catastrophic tidal waves from killing millions world.

programme.title: Roswell: The Untold Truth
programme.desc: Major Jesse Marcel investigates strange debris found in 1947, despite being told it's a weather balloon.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens and the New World Order 2
programme.desc: Recent discoveries reveal that a highly advanced race of extraterrestrial beings came to Earth in our ancient past, but the shocking realization is that they are still here now, among us and may have a sinister agenda beyond our wildest imaginations.

programme.title: Ancient Alien America
programme.desc: Native cultures have handed down shocking accounts for generations of Aliens from other worlds visiting Earth in the ancient past and their involvement with them.

programme.title: Dulce Base: The New Illuminati
programme.desc: Dulce, New Mexico is a hotspot for mysterious phenomena and alleged secret military collaboration between humans and aliens.

programme.title: Alien Contact: Secret Societies
programme.desc: Thousands of years ago a special, genetically advanced race of beings came to Earth. They were seen as Gods by primitive man and worshipped. They set themselves apart.

programme.title: Alien Crash at Roswell
programme.desc: The most enigmatic UFO incident in history exposed. Join Philip Coppens, star of History Channel's "Ancient Aliens" series in this and unprecedented expose on the Roswell Incident revealing that there is much more to this case than previously believed.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens : Origin of Humanity
programme.desc: Increasing evidence and sightings of UFOs suggest contact with extraterrestrial beings who may have influenced the origins of human life.

programme.title: Cover Ups Conspiracy: The Chinese Spy Balloon
programme.desc: Objects shot down in US/Canada airspace. Pentagon feigns ignorance. Alien involvement?

programme.title: UFO Conspiracies: The Hidden Truth
programme.desc: This documentary charts the US government's involvement with UFO phenomenon from 1947 to the present day. Featuring rare classified footage, expert interviews, cover-ups and the revelation of a secret 20 million dollar UFO research program.

programme.title: The UFO Battle of Los Angeles
programme.desc: 1942 LA: A mysterious UFO causes blackout & artillery fire. Remains unexplained.

programme.title: UFO Hunters: The Italian Ufologists
programme.desc: Italian researchers explore mass UFO sightings, clipeology, and real testimonies, delving into the history and research methods of ufology.

programme.title: Alien Mind Control: The UFO Enigma
programme.desc: This fascinating documentary offers an unprecedented look at a group of individuals who claim to have had life altering UFO encounters, and discovers the unique psychic abilities they unknowingly share.

programme.title: Linda Napolitano: The Alien Abduction of the Century
programme.desc: Linda Napolitano's 1989 alien abduction is the abduction case of the century.

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers: Episode 1
programme.desc: Jay banishes Ant's backside buddy, and Alice helps Chelsea get over the shock of her life.

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers: Episode 13
programme.desc: Emma needs Jay's help with a warning sign. Alice assists Louise with her eye-popping ink.

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers: Episode 6
programme.desc: Sketch meets Gaz, who has his best friend's initials in an intimate place, and the whole team are shocked by the cover-up he wants. Jay gives Lady Gaga superfan Harry the portrait of his dreams.

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers: Episode 5
programme.desc: Jay gives Ian a portrait that has to be seen to be believed and Alice covers Linsey's scar.

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers: Episode 11
programme.desc: Alice gets her claws into dog-lover William's cover when he betrays his furry friends in ink. Emma disguises her tattooed equations after attempts to impress her maths teacher didn't add up.

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers: Episode 10
programme.desc: Jay gives leuan a tribute to his late sister, while Sketch evicts the eye on Mike's thigh.

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers: Episode 8
programme.desc: Victoria is in desperate need of a tattoo cover-up so she can train as a teacher. Abigail gets inked at the age of 75, Hollie loses her cheeky chicken ink, and Lisa divorces a big tattoo mistake.

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers: Episode 15
programme.desc: Love is in the air as Glen rids Riley of her Valentine's issues, Jay fixes Leon's bedroom problems, Alice works on Suzanne's cocky Cupid, and Sketch divorces Jordan from his tattoo.

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers: Episode 5
programme.desc: Lou helps tomboy Lucy, who has a vulgar phrase tattooed on her leg. Skater boy Matt shows Sketch a tattoo in an unsightly place. Jay assists Amina, who thinks getting inked is worse than giving birth.

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers: Episode 15
programme.desc: Nathan banishes his bad luck back tatt. Ollie's wheezy Magaluf inking is sent into orbit.

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers: Episode 7
programme.desc: Sketch meets Billy, whose habit of tattooing himself to impress ladies has got out of hand.

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers: Episode 13
programme.desc: Harry wants a memorial tattoo dedicated to a very intimate part of himself after surviving testicular cancer. Matt has doodled on his own legs with a tattoo machine his parents got him for Christmas.

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers: Episode 7
programme.desc: Jay deals with a couple who are obsessed with going on holiday and getting cheap tattoos. Lou is busy sorting out Thom, who has arrived with a rude tribute to one of his friends on his rear end.

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers: Episode 5
programme.desc: Sketch conceals a large portrait on Les. Alice spreads Becca's favourite food on her leg.

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers: Episode 9
programme.desc: Ladies' man Ash needs help covering an embarrassing portrait of his beloved mum. Sean wants a cover for his leg tattoo of two dogs doing what comes naturally. Dancer Jay-Jay loses her X-rated tatt.

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers: Episode 4
programme.desc: Michael needs help with a holiday tattoo that's writing cheques his anatomy can't cash. Superfan Emma wants to commit to ink her love for Cheryl Fernandez-Versini. A fire-eater lights up Jay's eyes.

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers: Episode 10
programme.desc: Alice rids Sammie of an unladylike error, and Sketch erases Lloyd's misunderstood etching.

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers: Episode 2
programme.desc: Alice tackles Beverley's backside blunder. Jay wipes Bailey's holiday Poomoji tatt clean.

programme.title: Secrets of the London Underground
programme.desc: Tim Dunn and Siddy Holloway walk the Piccadilly line at night to explore the hidden World War II remains of Brompton Road, a station that played a strategic role in the Capital's defences against the German Luftwaffe.

programme.title: Secrets of the London Underground
programme.desc: Tim Dunn and Siddy Holloway explore the disused parts of London Bridge. Siddy visits Ongar in Essex and nearby Blake Hall.

programme.title: Secrets of the London Underground
programme.desc: Tim Dunn and Siddy Holloway explore Kings Cross St Pancras, including a secret siding and the disused Thameslink station.

programme.title: Secrets of the London Underground
programme.desc: Tim Dunn and Siddy Holloway explore the brand new Elizabeth Line and have access to two of its stations weeks before the line opens.

programme.title: Secrets of the London Underground
programme.desc: Tim Dunn and Siddy Holloway continue to uncover the mysteries of the London Underground by exploring the disused Jubilee line areas of Charing Cross station and its new claim to fame as a film location.

programme.title: Secrets of the London Underground
programme.desc: Tim Dunn and Siddy Holloway continue their exploration of the London Underground by uncovering the hidden world of the Waterloo and City line, the only line that is entirely underground.

programme.title: Secrets of the London Underground
programme.desc: Tim Dunn and Siddy Holloway explore King William Street, the original terminus of the first electric Tube in the world.

programme.title: Forbidden History
programme.desc: Did giants once inhabit the Earth? Jamie Theakston travels to Sardinia to investigate reports of enormous skeletons being found in a network of caves.

programme.title: Forbidden History
programme.desc: Jamie investigates the High Priests of the Temple in Jerusalem and how they hid sacred items from the Romans. He also looks at whether the Dead Sea Scrolls reveal the location of hidden wonders.

programme.title: Forbidden History
programme.desc: The magic and mystery of alchemy is revealed as Jamie Theakston meets a `potion maker' and hears about London's alchemic roots from author Joy Hancox.

programme.title: Inside the Ambulance
programme.desc: A girl suffers life-threatening breathing difficulties at school, an elderly lady is struggling with an infection and a young father experiences worrying chest pains.

programme.title: Inside the Ambulance
programme.desc: A teenager is in excruciating pain after falling and injuring his leg. Elsewhere, the paramedics treat a 94-year-old man showing signs of a stroke and another man with severe stomach pain.

programme.title: Inside the Ambulance
programme.desc: A young girl is reluctant to let the paramedics examine her injured head and a mature student needs medical help.

programme.title: Inside the Ambulance
programme.desc: Paramedics help an 81-year-old woman with dementia but must earn her trust before she will let them in. Plus, a Polish man needs help as he is suffering from agonising abdominal pain.

programme.title: Inside the Ambulance
programme.desc: The crew fight to restart a man's heart after he had a cardiac arrest and crashed the van he was driving. Elsewhere, a young woman is need of help following a series of severe stomach cramps.

programme.desc: Paramedics desperately try to save a patient whose heart has stopped for more than 15 minutes. Elsewhere, a pregnant woman struggles to breath and a young lad has a deep cut in his hand.

programme.desc: Medics treat a man who appears to be having a heart attack and needs to be taken to hospital right away. Meanwhile, crew also help a man who got so confused he came home early from his holiday.

programme.title: Eat Your Heart Out with Nick Helm
programme.desc: Nish Kumar joins Nick in London for a Brexit-defying continental feast. The pair enjoy Italian, Portuguese and Polish nosh on their jaunt round the capital.

programme.title: Eat Your Heart Out with Nick Helm
programme.desc: Comedian Nick Helm samples some lovely jubbly scran in Peckham. On the menu at two imaginatively named eateries - a bao bun at Mr Bao and tapas at Miss Tapas.

programme.title: Eat Your Heart Out with Nick Helm
programme.desc: The only way is rural Essex for famished funnyman Nick Helm, who mucks in as he grinds his own meat, plucks turkeys and hunts rabbits in a farm-to-fork experience.

programme.title: Eat Your Heart Out with Nick Helm
programme.desc: While in Soho, Nick Helm enjoys a fried chicken breakfast, ramen, and soup dumplings with two famous pals.

programme.title: Eat Your Heart Out with Nick Helm
programme.desc: In between gigs at Machfest, food-loving funnyman Nick Helm enjoys a vegan platter with Rhod Gilbert and visits a Willy Wonka-style sweet shop.

programme.title: Eat Your Heart Out with Nick Helm
programme.desc: In Islington, Nick shares a chop with Bob Mortimer.

programme.title: Eat Your Heart Out with Nick Helm
programme.desc: Nick Helm has landed the dream job - meeting comedy heroes and eating tasty scran. Nick invents his own cocktail and meets vegan Morgana Robinson - at a steakhouse.

programme.desc: Lovelorn funnyman Nick Helm takes his mind off women by pigging out. In Brighton, Nick enjoys some American pancakes and goes veggie with Thunder's Luke Morley.

programme.title: Eat Your Heart Out with Nick Helm
programme.desc: Newly single comic Nick Helm mends his broken heart, by pumping it full of tasty food. Nick returns home for waffles with bacon, curry and mum's prawn lasagne.

programme.desc: Nick Helm enjoys a romantic, culinary getaway to Paris, but with comedian David Trent in tow, not his now ex-girlfriend. The odd couple savour oysters and champagne.
