programme.title: The Crystal Maze Celebrity: Celeb 5 - The Derry Girls cast
programme.desc: Maze Master Richard Ayoade leads team captain Saoirse Monica Jackson and her fellow cast members Jamie-Lee O'Donnell, Louisa Harland, Nicola Coughlan and Dylan Llewellyn on a time-travelling adventure to collect those precious crystals.

programme.title: The Crystal Maze Celebrity: Celeb 2 - Dennis, Katie, Bez Roman, Binky
programme.desc: Former footballer Dennis Wise captains a celebrity team including DJ Roman Kemp, Made in Chelsea's Binky Felstead, Happy Mondays maraca shaker Bez, and published author Katie Price.
programme.sub-title: Celeb 2 - Dennis, Katie, Bez Roman, Binky

programme.title: The Crystal Maze Celebrity: Episode 1
programme.desc: Tonight’s celebrity adventurers are Steve Jones, Scarlett Moffatt, David Coulthard, Jodie Kidd & Joey Essex.

programme.title: The Crystal Maze Celebrity: Episode 3
programme.desc: This week’s celebrities taking on the maze are Rylan Clarke, Adil Ray, Tamara Wall and Joel Dommett.

programme.title: The Crystal Maze Celebrity: Episode 11
programme.desc: This week Pop star Faye Tozer steps up as team captain of the latest celebrity supergroup to tackle the crystal maze.

programme.title: The Crystal Maze Celebrity: Episode 2
programme.desc: Tonight’s celebrity adventurers are Ore Oduba, Vicky Pattison, Alex Brooker, Lydia Bright and Louie Spence.

programme.title: The Crystal Maze Celebrity: Celeb 3 - David, Wayne, Rachel, Charlotte, Judy
programme.desc: Judy Murray captains a team of celebs hoping to ace their way to the Crystal Dome. Paralympic David Weir, footballer Wayne Bridge, Countdown's Rachel Riley and TV’s Charlotte Crosby all combine to tackle skill, physical, mystery and mental challenges.
programme.sub-title: Celeb 3 - David, Wayne, Rachel, Charlotte, Judy

programme.title: The Crystal Maze Celebrity: Episode 12
programme.desc: TV presenter Laura Whitmore Captains her team; comedian Chris Ramsey, dancers Perri Kiely and Jordan Banjo, and retired rugby player Gareth Thomas into a world of physical, mental, skilful and mysterious challenges.

programme.title: The Crystal Maze Celebrity: Episode 4
programme.desc: This gathering of the Crystal Maze is captained by actor Sunetra Sarker as she pilots plucky TV broadcaster Matthew Wright, seasoned politician Anne Widdecombe actor Nikki Sampson and reality TV Hunk Wes Nelson.

programme.title: The Crystal Maze Celebrity: Episode 6
programme.desc: This week’s intrepid band of celebrity Mazekateers are ably led by ‘dad vibe’ BAFTA winning actor and League Of Gentlemen lynchpin Steve Pemberton. Hot stepping support comes in the form of Strictly’s Oti Mabuse and Naked Attraction’s Anna Richardson.

programme.title: The Crystal Maze Celebrity: Episode 3
programme.desc: Crystal Maze team captain actor Nancy Sorrell leads her fellow adventurers, comedian Jim Moir (AKA: Vic Reeves), reality TV’s Ferne McCann, former cricketer Graeme Swann and comedian Susan Calman, on a wild ride through the 4 zones.

programme.title: The Crystal Maze Celebrity: Celeb 4 - Joe, Radzi, Kate, Ashley, Richard
programme.desc: This week broadcasting legend Richard Madeley captains his team featuring comedian Joe Wilkinson, broadcaster Kate Garraway, Blue Peter’s Radzi Chinyanganya, and Pussycat Dolls star Ashley Roberts.
programme.sub-title: Celeb 4 - Joe, Radzi, Kate, Ashley, Richard

programme.title: The Crystal Maze Celebrity: Episode 7
programme.desc: This episode has actress Tamzin Outhwaite commandeering former cricketer Phil Tufnell, TV Doctor Dr Ranj Singh, reality TV star Francis Boulle and Comedian/TV presenter Joel Dommett through a phalanx of challenges.

programme.title: The Crystal Maze Celebrity: Episode 4
programme.desc: Tonight's celebrity adventurers are Spencer Matthews, Stacey Solomon, Tom Allen, Andrea McLean and Joe Swash.

programme.title: The Crystal Maze Celebrity: Episode 1
programme.desc: Gemma Collins – with team mates James “Arg” Argent, legendary TV personality Carol Vorderman, comedian Ellie Taylor and TV presenter Rick Edwards fighting to maintain any sense of decorum and to get a word in edge wise.

programme.title: The Crystal Maze Celebrity: Episode 8
programme.desc: This show sees DJ Matt Edmondson lead his teammates TV legend Debbie McGee, dancer Kimberley Wyatt, retired footballer Michael Owen and reality TV star Chris Hughes.

programme.title: The Crystal Maze Celebrity: Episode 9
programme.desc: Pop star and captain Fleur East leads this thespian filled episode of the Crystal Maze guiding actors John Thompson, Nina Wadia and Natalie Cassidy as well as realty TV’s Georgia “Toff” Toffolo on a wild ride full of twists and turns in every zone.

programme.title: The Crystal Maze Celebrity: Celeb 1 - Big Narstie, Kelly, Greg, Jorgie, Alfie
programme.desc: Olympic legend Dame Kelly Holmes takes charge of grime MC Big Narstie, actress Jorgie Porter, internet superstar Alfie Deyes and fellow gold medallist Greg Rutherford on an action-packed journey to the Crystal Dome.
programme.sub-title: Celeb 1 - Big Narstie, Kelly, Greg, Jorgie, Alfie

programme.title: Mob Wives: Big Ang: Bigs Shots
programme.desc: Big Ang holds a casting call for shot guys as she prepares for the grand reopening of her bar the Drunken Monkey, and she considers reconciling with her husband Neil.L

programme.title: Mob Wives: Big Ang: Big House
programme.desc: Ang decides to let Neil move back in and tries to follow her doctor's advice to lead a healthier lifestyle, which proves to be more challenging than she thought

programme.title: Mob Wives: Big Ang: Big Dogs
programme.desc: Ang trains Lil' Louis for a dog show, and after moving into her dream home with Neil, she throws a huge house party that takes a turn for the worse.

programme.title: Mob Wives: Big Ang: Big Spender
programme.desc: Ang travels to Florida to look for a beachfront condo, bringing along her closest friends for a weekend of lavish partying

programme.title: Mob Wives: Big Ang: Big Bust
programme.desc: Lil' Louis visits the vet, the Drunken Monkey staff and patrons head to Atlantic City on a party bus, and Ang tries to get her son AJ to move back home

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: 'Conned to Death' covers the murder of Michele MacNeill and how investigators and forensics brought her killer to justice.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: When Kelsey Berreth vanishes on Thanksgiving in 2018, blood in her house and cell phone records indicate that there is more to Kelsey's disappearance than meets the eye.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: Following the investigation into a body found in a plastic container and how the killer is found.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: The terrifying assault of Ronda Guzman and the investigation that reveals her attacker after 33 years.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: Following the 35-year investigation and forensic advances that identify Rosa's savage killer.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: Following the investigation that reveals the predator responsible for numerous sexual assaults.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: The story of a sadistic crime and how investigators brought the merciless attacker to justice.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: The investigation into the brutal murder of Shelby Weatherly, and how the police caught her killer.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: The investigation to catch a serial rapist and how advanced DNA technology finally tracked him down.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: The story of a double-homicide and how dedicated police work, alongside forensics, solved the case.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: How investigators uncovered what happened in the moments leading up to the death of Jchandra Brown.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: The death of an innocent mother and how detectives identified her killer and proved his guilt.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: An innocent victim was lured to his death and cutting edge forensics helped to find the killer.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: Mary Ann Perez left a bar just outside of New Orleans. Early the next morning, her family received a call from an anonymous woman, mentioning Mary had run into car trouble. She never returned home.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: The story of the tragic murder of Brett Wentworth, how police tracked his killer down and how advanced forensic technology was key to solving the case.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: When Wendy Speakes was found dead wearing a strangers' shoes, police launched an investigation into who could have murdered a well-loved member of a quiet community.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: Sharon Whelan and her two daughters were murdered in their home on Christmas eve by a cold and calculating killer. Multi-discipline forensics uncovered his horrific actions and brought him to justice.
programme.sub-title: The Murders of Sharon, Zarah and Nadia Whelan

programme.title: Evidence of Evil

programme.title: South Park: Guitar Queer-O
programme.desc: Guitar Queer-o: Stan and Kyle are set to hit big time with their skills on computer game Guitar Hero. Their manager convinces Stan that Kyle is holding him back. Will the "band" break up? (S11, E13)

programme.title: South Park: The List
programme.desc: The List: The boys steal a list from the girls which rates their looks from the cutest to the ugliest. Spirits plummet, while for others egos inflate! Can the ghost of Abraham Lincoln help? (S11, E14)

programme.title: South Park: Tonsil Trouble
programme.desc: Tonsil Trouble: A botched blood transfusion results in Cartman getting AIDS. How far will he go to find a cure? Kyle had better watch out... (S12, E01)

programme.title: South Park: Britney's New Look
programme.desc: Britney's New Look: The media circus arrives in South Park as Britney Spears hides in the town. After a photo of her urinating on a ladybug sells for $100,000 the boys have a brain wave. (S12, E02)

programme.title: South Park: Major B**bage
programme.desc: Major B**bage: The hysterical parents of South Park have another reason to panic after 'cheesing' becomes popular among kids. Kenny becomes addicted to the out-of-this-world hallucinations. (S12, E03)

programme.title: Robot Wars: Revealed
programme.desc: Behind-the-scenes footage of the second semi-final of `Robot Wars: The Second Wars', beginning with recaps of the second group of six competitors to reach that stage of the main competition.

programme.title: Robot Wars: Revealed
programme.desc: Four robotic warriors have battled their way to the Grand Final. The other competitors have been sent to a scrapheap. A look at what it's like behind the scenes of the most intense stage of the competition.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: Thermidor 2 and Kronic the Wedgehog meet again in a replay of another heat. Thermidor 2 puts up an impressive fight as it takes down every robot in its path.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: Heat number 11 of the series sees controversy as T-Wrecks makes a bold move that breaks the rule about having an active weapon. Round one pits Mantis, Infernal Contraption, Bulldog Breed and Jabber against one another.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: Eight robots enter the arena, including old crowd favourite, Behemoth. Heat L also features a grudge match to settle the score between Behemoth and Crushtacean.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: Champion robot Panic Attack returns in the thirteenth heat of the series. A series 5 round is replicated as the Four Horsemen and Team Panic Attack are once again pitted against each another.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: In the 14th heat of the seventh series, round one sees Spawn Again, Chip and NEATer Machine do battle with Revenge of Trouble & Strife. The next round pits Topbot against R.O.C.S and Raging Nightmare.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: As the semifinals draw near, Bigger Brother makes its mark in the arena, as it takes on Colossus and Typhoon 2 in round one. Round two sees DisConstructor tackle Xenomorph, Hammerhead 2 and Iron-Awe 2.1.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: Firestorm makes a long-awaited comeback in a battle against Daisy-Cutter, Black and Blue, and Bamm Bamm. Heat P determines the robots who will make it to the semi-finals of the seventh series.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: Eight competitors compete for a spot in the next semi-final round as half are eliminated. Round 1 sees Tornado employ the use of a spinner drum to flip its opponent.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: The four victors from the round 1 semifinal compete for a place in the grand final. Round 1 sees Firestorm 5 go head-to-head with Mute, in a flipping assault.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: In the eliminating rounds, Tornado takes on Storm 2, and X-Terminator challenges Typhoon 2, in a fierce attack that takes out the disc weapon of Typhoon 2.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: Six robots fight until one is taken down. The remaining fighters regroup and continue until only one remains. Round one begins in a merciless fashion as Ripper flips Robochicken.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: Challengers from more than five main competitions battle for supremacy. In a David versus Goliath battle, Dantomkia takes on the might of Behemoth in an attempt to throw it out of the arena.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: Eight teams made up of families and friends from across the country put their homemade robots to the test inside a purpose-built arena, packed with arena hazards and four House Robots. The winner at the end will go forward to the grand-final.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: The huge axe of Robot Thor driven by Jason, a builder from Northampton, clashes with father-and-son team Will and Ian from Team Shockwave. A consultant cardiologist and his two sons cause a huge upset with their brand new untested robot.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: An eclectic collection of homemade robots including Glitterbomb, designed by nine-year-old April, which comes complete with a huge pink axe. A team of students from Falkirk bring a robot made of wood with a petrol engine.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: Former holiday camp bluecoats enter the competition with their `launcher' Apollo. Father and-son-team Kan-Opener have a robot with huge piercing claws. A team of engineering students have created a future tech machine called Sweeney Todd.

programme.title: A Haunting: Stalked by Evil
programme.desc: A shadowy presence manifests from the darkened corners of Judy McCarthy’s Texas home.

programme.title: A Haunting: Haunted Victorian
programme.desc: After moving in their dream home, Edwin Gonzalez and Lillian Otero begin to experience strange occurrences; mysterious footsteps and unexplained noises. Lillian is physically attacked while sleeping and the couple tries to escape, but is it too late?

programme.title: A Haunting: Monster in the Apartment
programme.desc: A ghost attacks Morgan Knudsen in order to drive her out and get to her friend Bob.

programme.title: A Haunting: Trapped In Terror
programme.desc: Soon after moving into an older home in a quaint suburb of Cincinnati, OH, Taylor Jones catches her mother practicing black magic in her daughter Isabelle’s bedroom. Her fears become reality when Taylor notices Isabelle playing with an invisible friend.

programme.title: A Haunting
programme.desc: Romie moves into a new home but begins to have nightmares and see shadowy spirits pacing.

programme.title: A Haunting: Fear Feeders
programme.desc: Soon after Al Gonzalez purchases a home outside Fort Wayne, Indiana, he begins to hear strange noises and sees unexplainable shadows. Paranormal investigators determine the entities in Al's home are dangerous and that he is not their first victim.

programme.title: A Haunting: Demons Never Die
programme.desc: Shortly after starting a new job and moving his family to the suburbs, Bill Toler suspects his house is haunted. Paranormal investigators uncover a portal in their home and discover a demon followed Bill home from his job at the state penitentiary.

programme.title: A Haunting: Heartland Horror
programme.desc: Teenager Nolan Lydolph has seen ghosts his entire life. But after he and his parents return home from a ghost tour in Missouri, strange spirits creep through their home. Nolan undertakes a life-threatening struggle to rid his family of an undaunted evil.

programme.title: A Haunting: Sallie’s House
programme.desc: Deb and Tony’s son is born and his toys take on a life of their own.

programme.title: A Haunting: Haunted Past
programme.desc: As Deborah Utley begins experiencing paranormal events in her home, she turns to her faith for protection. But when her children are targeted by the entity she seeks the aid of paranormal investigators to end the cycle of terror.

programme.title: A Haunting: Nightmare In Bridgeport
programme.desc: Connecticut child safety specialist Bob Baker has devoted his life to protecting children from natural and supernatural harm. When his mother starts hearing voices in his childhood home, Bob is faced with a demon that evolves from his own nightmares.

programme.title: A Haunting: The Diabolical
programme.desc: A session with a Ouija board transforms Marie’s home into a portal for the diabolical.

programme.title: A Haunting: Ashes To Evil
programme.desc: Soon after moving in a large apartment in Hampton, Tennessee, Amelia’s family can’t shake the feeling that they are not alone. An evil entity lurks in their dream home and is targeting family members. They turn to paranormal investigators for help.

programme.title: A Haunting: Evil Rises
programme.desc: After a major surgery forces Jacinda Rearick to recuperate at home, she discovers orbs in family photos. At first, Jacinda believes that they are her deceased parents watching over her. But something much more sinister is invading her home.

programme.title: A Haunting: Where Evil Lurks
programme.desc: Soon after the Shea family moves into their new home, eerie noises and ghostly voices begin.

programme.title: A Haunting: Mother's Terror
programme.desc: When Jeanette's firefighter husband dies in the line of duty, she moves her daughters to a rustic hamlet in Long Island to start anew. Shortly after moving in, an evil entity lashes out at her daughter, Jeanette refuses to quit without a fight.

programme.title: A Haunting: Dark Wrath
programme.desc: Unsettling nightmares of a dark angry figure plague Cindy as she prepares to move her family.

programme.title: A Haunting: Dangerous Games
programme.desc: Carl, Keith and Cynthia Johnson begin using a spirit board, to communicate with the spirit haunting their home. But when their sister, Cynthia, is attacked both boys realize they are in over their heads and reach out to a paranormal investigator for help.

programme.title: A Haunting: Vision Of Terror
programme.desc: When Stacy Stowe hears ghostly sounds in her home, she assumes it's the spirit of her late husband who died in a tragic car accident. But a psychic warns Stacy that she will find no peace until she closes the portal that has opened the door for evil.

programme.title: Medium: The Reckoning
programme.desc: After a chance meeting with a woman, Allison finds herself opening a cold case.

programme.title: Medium: Method to Madness

programme.title: Medium: Doctor's Orders
programme.desc: Allison gets a visit from an old enemy who threatens one of her children.

programme.title: Medium: Raising Can
programme.desc: Allison finds a missing boy but questions whether she should save him.

programme.title: Medium: A Changed Man
programme.desc: A doctor's appointment leads Joe on a quest for a scientific answer to his family's psychic abilities and leads Allison to open a cold case.

programme.title: Medium: Allison Wonderland
programme.desc: Allison has to decode her visions when a mentally ill man dies and attempts to send her a message.

programme.title: Medium: Sweet Child O' Mine

programme.title: Medium: Lucky in Love

programme.title: Medium: Knowing Her

programme.title: Medium: S.O.S

programme.desc: Allison tries to help a woman prove that she is being secretly watched at night.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 3
programme.desc: A lorry fire poses endless problems for recovery, with burning ash complicating matters.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 4
programme.desc: A tipped-over shipment of A4 paper ends up being a tough task to take on.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 5
programme.desc: A crew trying to take care of a burned-out trailer struggles due to its missing wheels.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 6
programme.desc: Three veteran recovery experts struggle with a terribly trashed truck.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 7
programme.desc: Alpha Recovery join the team, tackling a 45-tonne crane that's become a pain.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 8
programme.desc: Kev tackles a big bin lorry, and Aidan has a brush with a bus.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 9
programme.desc: After a lorry rolls over under power lines, making a race for time.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 10
programme.desc: A 50 ton construction machine and the 20 ton trailer carrying it land in a stream.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 11
programme.desc: A 50-ton construction machine is stranded by a severely-damaged Victorian bridge.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 12
programme.desc: A recovery crew work to rescue an articulated lorry that fell down a 20-metre embankment.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 13
programme.desc: Sean tackles a telehandler that has flipped over in the back of a very muddy garden.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 14
programme.desc: On the M25 near Enfield two lorries, two cars and a van have piled into each other.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 15
programme.desc: A 40-tonne lorry careers off the M1 and plunges down an embankment into a ditch.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 16
programme.desc: On the M11, a loaded truck is marooned after a rear axle collapsed while at full speed.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 17
programme.desc: In Northumberland, a 32-tonne tipper gets lost in the dark and ends up stuck in a field.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 18
programme.desc: Kevin is called to a challenging recovery: a 75-tonne crane stranded in the countryside.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 19
programme.desc: Vehicles in need of recovery include a Land Rover Discovery dumped in a canal.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 20
programme.desc: Just outside Newcastle, Kev is sent to rescue a wheelie bin delivery truck that is stuck.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 1
programme.desc: In Hertfordshire, rookie op Euan is tasked with rescuing a ten-tonne rigid.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 7
programme.desc: Aang, Katara, and Sokka arrive at a town being terrorized by a mysterious force from the spirit world. Aang doesn't know how to help these people, and realizes he has much to learn about being Avatar.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 8
programme.desc: During the winter solstice, Aang must reach a Fire Nation temple while dodging Prince Zuko, Commander Zhao, and the Fire Sages who guard it.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 9
programme.desc: When Katara's desire to master Waterbending gets the best of her, the kids find themselves on the run from pirates.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 10
programme.desc: Our heroes' friendship is tested when they meet Jet, a charismatic teenager leading a band of rebels who are fighting against the Fire Nation.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 11
programme.desc: When Aang and friends come to the rim of a giant canyon, they are asked to help guide two groups of refugees across. Aang quickly learns that this will be no easy task.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 12
programme.desc: A powerful storm brings up painful memories of the past - and puts everyone in jeopardy in the present.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 13
programme.desc: When Sokka and Katara get too sick to travel, Aang goes out on his own to find a cure for them. But he is captured by Zhao and held prisoner inside an impenetrable fortress.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 14
programme.desc: Aang, Katara, and Sokka discover a village of people who are all reliant on a fortuneteller in their everyday lives but they are so reliant that they are blind to the imminent danger they are all in.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 15
programme.desc: Aang feels insecure when Katara and Sokka come across something that reminds them of home. Because Aang thinks his friends might leave him, he hides an important message which only leads to trouble.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 16
programme.desc: Aang attempts to find a Firebending master to teach him while Katara learns that she possesses a special power.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 17
programme.desc: After hearing rumors about surviving Airbenders, the kids journey to the Northern Air temple to see for themselves. What they find there could spell disaster for all enemies of the Fire Nation.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 18
programme.desc: The kids reach the Northern Water tribe, and Aang and Katara look for a Waterbending Master as Sokka falls for a princess. Zuko must find a way to continue his quest for the Avatar.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 19
programme.desc: The Northern Water Tribe braces itself for an attack by Admiral Zhao's Fire Navy fleet. Aang struggles to defend the city. He wonders if there isn't a better way to use his Avatar abilities.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 20
programme.desc: Zhao's invasion breaks through the outer wall of the Northern Water Tribe's defenses, and he reveals a sinister plan. Aang goes to the spirit world for help.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 1
programme.desc: Aang and the group meet an Earth Kingdom general who wants to use Aang's powerful `Avatar State' as a weapon to defeat the Fire Nation. But it's more difficult than Aang thinks.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 2
programme.desc: On the way to Omashu, the kids meet some nomads who show them a shortcut through the `cave of two lovers'. When they get lost in the caves, they must trust in love to escape.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 3
programme.desc: The kids return to Omashu so that Aang can learn Earthbending from King Bumi; however, when they get there, they are shocked to find the city is now in Fire Nation hands.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 4
programme.desc: When the kids end up in a mysterious and strange swamp, their fears are exposed. And Aang learns about being `connected to the Earth' from an unlikely teacher.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 5
programme.desc: Aang and the gang discover an Earth town that celebrates `Avatar Day'. They learn that it is not a celebration of the Avatar, but a festival of anger for something Aang did in his past.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 6
programme.desc: In search for an Earthbending teacher for Aang, the kids go to an underground Earthbending tournament where they encounter Toph, a blind, but powerful Earthbender.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 7
programme.desc: Travelling without Uncle now, Zuko wanders alone into an Earth Kingdom town where he bonds with a local boy. Meanwhile, Zuko is haunted by memories of his own youth.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 8
programme.desc: As the kids are pursued relentlessly by a mysterious machine, their exhaustion puts them at each other's throats.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 9
programme.desc: When Aang struggles with a block while trying to learn Earthbending from Toph, he wonders if the problem is with him or his teacher. Meanwhile, Sokka gets himself in a jam.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 10
programme.desc: A professor leads the kids to a spirit library in the middle of the desert, where Sokka hopes to discover powerful secrets to use against the Fire Nation.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 11
programme.desc: Aang searches for Appa, while Katara struggles to keep everyone together so they can survive in the vast desert. Meanwhile, Uncle and Zuko seek help from an ancient secret society.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 12
programme.desc: When the kids can't take the easy way into Ba Sing Se, they must escort a family of refugees there the hard way, through the deadly Serpent's Pass.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 13
programme.desc: Aang discovers a colossal Fire Nation invention heading for Ba Sing Se, and the kids must stop it before it destroys the great wall that protects the city.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 14
programme.desc: Aang and the kids finally arrive in Ba Sing Se to see the Earth King, only to find mysterious forces within the city conspiring to stop them.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 15
programme.desc: A series of short stories that explore the individual adventures of Katara and Toph, Uncle, Sokka, Aang, Zuko, and Momo.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 16
programme.desc: In this special episode, we go back in time to the moment Appa was stolen.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 17
programme.desc: While searching for Appa, the kids run into Jet but are torn about whether to trust him or not. Meanwhile, Zuko also hunts for Appa.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 18
programme.desc: The kids battle Long Feng when they try to show the Earth King the conspiracy taking place in his city. Zuko becomes seriously ill and has odd dreams as he faces a spiritual crisis.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 19
programme.desc: A guru at the Eastern Air Temple helps Aang take the next step in his Avatar journey. Plus, Sokka meets his long-lost father, Azula hatches a diabolical plan, and Uncle and Zuko open a tea shop.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 20
programme.desc: Everyone races against time to stop Azula's sinister conquest of Ba Sing Se. Zuko and Katara spend time together, while Aang's destiny hangs in the balance, as does Zuko's.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 1
programme.desc: After sustaining serious injuries, Aang awakens to find himself aboard a Fire Nation ship. Meanwhile, Zuko journeys home.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 2
programme.desc: To better camouflage themselves as real Fire Nation citizens, the kids check out a Fire Nation school. Also, Zuko confronts Uncle.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 3
programme.desc: The gang arrive at a suffering Fire Nation fishing village, and a mysterious spirit appears to help the villagers.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): The Legend of Koji
programme.desc: The Turtles take an incredible trip back in time when they follow Shredder back to 16th Century Japan, where they join forces with Splinter's ancestor, the youthful samurai koji, and help him found the Foot Clan.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Convicts from Dimension X
programme.desc: Donatello, tinkering with his InterDimensional Early Warning System device, accidently frees two vicious convicts from their maximum security cell on Dimension X, bringing them to earth.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): White Belt, Black Heart
programme.desc: Splinter's ancient sensei, Master Mogo-San, arrives from Japan, seeking to find his grandson, to hand him a precious family heirloom - a sacred white ninja belt.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Night of the Rogues
programme.desc: Determined to stop the turtles once and for all, Shredder enlists some of the most memorable villains from past episodes into an army of 'rogues'!

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Attack of the Neutrinos
programme.desc: When Krang captures the Neutrino's, he subjects the fun-loving, hot-rodding teenagers from Dimension X to a brain treatment which turns them evil!

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Escape from the Planet of the Turtleoids
programme.desc: The Turtles must once again help their Turtleoid friend Kurma defend the planet Shellri-La from alien invaders.
programme.sub-title: Escape from the Planet of the Turtleoids

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Revenge of the Fly
programme.desc: When Baxter Stockman, AKA the Fly, gets his pincers on some of Krang and Shredder's mutagen, he uses it to start turning everyone in the city into giant hideous mutant insects!

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Atlantis Awakes
programme.desc: The Turtles join forces with Merdude, a strange fish-creature, and journey with him to the fabulous underwater city of Atlantis.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Dirk Savage: Mutant Hunter
programme.desc: When eccentric zillionaire A.J. Howard hires Dirk Savage, a professional mercenary, to rid the city of its 'mutant problem', the first mutants he goes after are the Turtles!

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Invasion of the Krangazoids
programme.desc: It's trouble for the Turtles when Krang makes five clones of himself and sends them up to do his bidding in the city.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Combat Land
programme.desc: The Turtles are invited to be the first guests at combat Land, an amusement park where visitors fight a wide variety of robotic warriors from various historical eras.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Shredder Triumphant!
programme.desc: The Turtles face their greatest challenge ever when they become trapped in Dimension X--while Shredder and Krang bring the Technodrome out of the ocean depths and at last conquer the city!

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Get Shredder!
programme.desc: Shredder & Krang are still loose on Earth, but without the resources of the Technodrome, they plan to steal equipment from the abandoned Hall of Science at the World Fair.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Wrath of the Rat King
programme.desc: Burne has created a hot line for callers to use should they spot those responsible for the destruction of the Channel Six News Building. Inside the Hall of Science, Shredder is fearful that the Turtles will eventually find a way into the building.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Cyber-Turtles
programme.desc: While investigating the theft of a rare telescope, the Astro-Viewer, the Turtles discover odd tracks leading away from the National Space Exploration Centre.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): State of Shock
programme.desc: After defeating a mysterious group of ninjas at the Emeryville Power Station, the Turtles decode part of a map that they were able to liberate from the would-be thieves.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Cry H.A.V.O.C.!
programme.desc: The Turtles get the drop on masked thieves hijacking a jewellery store, only to have themselves arrested for the crime! Before the turtles can be booked, they are rescued by the mutants Amok and Overdrive.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): H.A.V.O.C. in the Streets!
programme.desc: Titanus sends of couple of his H.A.V.O.C.mutants to bust into the aerospace plant and steal some much needed equipment. Only problem is that the Turtles were waiting for them.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Enter: Krakus
programme.desc: Krakus, a cop from the future, arrives and thinking that the Turtles are in league with Titanus, shakes them down for information.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Turtle Trek
programme.desc: Krang activates his new dimensional portal, thanks to Shredder's installation of the Energy Transmitter at the Power Relay Station, giving him access to Dimension X.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): The Unknown Ninja
programme.desc: While watching video tapes of old battles, Raphael sees a mystery person spying on them. While the Turtles investigate, an alien warlord named Dregg sends his TechnoGansters to steal all the gold on Earth.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Dregg of the Earth
programme.desc: April contacts the Turtles to let them know that Dregg has landed on Earth and is preparing a press conference. The Turtles rush to meet April at the Park, where they hear Dregg announce his intentions and offers the world his molecular converter.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): The Wrath of Medusa
programme.desc: Believing that the Turtles are the only thing that stands between him and total domination of the planet, Dregg makes contact with Medusa, a sinisterly beautiful alien.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): The Showdown
programme.desc: April contacts the Turtles to inform them that all the TV stations in the City are jammed. Sleazebug tries to recruit the Turtles for a martial arts tournament.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Split-Second
programme.desc: Carter, April and the Turtles investigate a break-in at the Antique Timepiece Museum. Convinced that Dregg is responsible, the Turtles discover a clue on a wall display.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Carter the Enforcer
programme.desc: Splinter convinces the Turtles that it is their duty to fight evil, even when the whole world is against them. Carter and the Turtles team up with April to get the goods on Dregg.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): The Return of Dregg
programme.desc: While the Turtles work on using fragments of the Vortex Crystal to stabilize their mutations, Lord Dregg plans to use the fragments to create another Vortex Crystal to power his Vortex Transporter.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): The Beginning of the End
programme.desc: While Raphael, Michelangelo, Donatello and Carter work on restoring Leonardo to his regular self, Mung steals all the plutonium from a power plant in order for Dregg to build a Plutonium Ray to turn Leonardo into a radioactive killer.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): The Power of Three
programme.desc: Mungg informs Dregg that he came across two individuals who claimed they were old acquaintances of the turtles: Shredder and Krang!

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): A Turtle in Time
programme.desc: The Turtles', Shredder's and Krang's battles skills, powers, and memories are absorbed into Dregg.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Turtles to the Second Power
programme.desc: Dregg and his crew plan an invasion of Earth to make it his new home base, but first he has to get his transporter chip back from Shredder.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): The Day the Earth Disappeared
programme.desc: With the city breaking apart, the Turtles head to the street to investigate and see the Dreggnaut appear in the sky. With Mung's help, Dregg reprograms the transporter to open a warp in space.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Divide and Conquer
programme.desc: Lord Dregg launches a final attack on the Ninja Turtles.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Turtle Tracks
programme.desc: April O'Neil, ace reporter for Channel 6, investigates recent break-ins, allegedly by Ninjas, which have resulted in the thefts of numerous technologies.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Enter: The Shredder
programme.desc: The Shredder kidnaps Splinter in an attempt to lure the Turtles to his own cause. In order to rescue Splinter the Turtles must enter the Shredder's mobile fortress and brave its dangerous weaponry.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): A Thing about Rats
programme.desc: Baxter Stockman, a mad scientist, is showing an exterminator his new invention: a rat catching robot called Mousers.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Hot Rodding Teenagers from Dimension X
programme.desc: Shredder experiments with the Inter-Dimensional Portal, hoping to contact Krang's' Rock Soldiers and prepare an invasion of Earth.
programme.sub-title: Hot Rodding Teenagers from Dimension X

programme.title: Riptide: Beat The Box
programme.desc: Murray's lie detector causes aggrevation for Nick and Cody, but also proves quite helpful when a writer they are hired to protect jumps from a high building.

programme.title: Riptide: Father's Day
programme.desc: The guys are asked by a priest to help a young single mother. They eventually learn that the father is a high ranking police man who is in line to be Chief.

programme.title: Riptide: Be True To Your School
programme.desc: When Nick goes to his high school reunion, some men shoot up the place. He later learns that some of his classmates and a teacher are involved in illegal activities.

programme.title: Riptide: It's A Vial Sort Of Business
programme.desc: The guys are hired by a couple who are concerned that their son who was going to college dropped out and went to work in a fast food restaurant.
programme.sub-title: It's A Vial Sort Of Business

programme.title: Riptide: Peter Pan Is Alive And Well
programme.desc: When the Riptide agency is hired to catch a thief in a luxerous beach club, they come across an old lifeguard pal of Cody's.
programme.sub-title: Peter Pan Is Alive And Well

programme.title: Riptide: Catch A Fallen Star
programme.desc: When a mobster's son is out to kill a former actress the boys protect and help her to retrieve the property deed to Pier 56.

programme.title: Riptide: Gams People Play
programme.desc: A woman entering a beauty contest is threathened by an unknown adversary and the Riptide boys are hired to catch this person.

programme.title: Riptide: Prisoner Of War
programme.desc: Nick's new girlfriend runs away after witnessing a pedestrian get run over with deadly consequences.

programme.title: Riptide: Baxter And Boz
programme.desc: The boys are hired by the owner of a helicopter manufacturing business to expose some of his employees, who are covering up a dangerous design flaw.

programme.title: Riptide: Curse Of The Mary Aberdeen
programme.desc: A man who is supposed to be dead for eighteen years, hires the Riptide boys to find the Mary Aberdeen "before it kills again".

programme.title: Riptide: Boz Busters
programme.desc: When Murray is offered a dream job in computer research he leaves the agency and then goes missing. Nick and Cody set out to find him.

programme.title: Riptide: Oil Bets Are Off
programme.desc: When an oil magnet is murdered and the police aren't doing much about it, the Riptide agency is off to get some answers for the daughter of the deceased.

programme.title: Riptide: Girls Night Out
programme.desc: Two suburban women who owe money to a lone shark are forced to become burglars to pay him back.

programme.title: Riptide: Polly Want An Explanation
programme.desc: The Riptide agency, a wannabe-FBI agent, trouble prone con man Mack McPherson and his parrot all get in trouble with organized crime.

programme.title: Riptide: The Twisted Cross
programme.desc: A woman hires the guys to help her see her son whom her ex husband refuses to let her. They learn that the father is teaching his son to be a Nazi.

programme.title: Riptide: Fuzzy Vision
programme.desc: After the Riptide breaks down, the boys end up in a weird little town where a woman who can see into the future is suspected of murder.

programme.title: Riptide: Arrivederci, Baby
programme.desc: Nick "the pilot, Cody " the mustache" and Bozo "the docter" help Murray's Italian friend Angelo Guirilini, when his son is badly wounded.

programme.title: Riptide: Harmony And Grits
programme.desc: A seminar about harmony and communucation leads -apart from a fistfight and a bunch of arguments- to a concerned wife who's afraid her husband is having an affair.

programme.desc: Semifinal, 1st Leg.
programme.sub-title: Olympique Lyonnais Women vs. Paris Saint-Germain

programme.title: Kim's Convenience: Janet's Boyfriend
programme.desc: Janet struggles to keep her parents from learning about her relationship with Raj. Meanwhile, Jung and Kimchee plan a party.

programme.title: Kim's Convenience: Good Neighbours
programme.desc: Kim's Convenience gets a noisy new neighbor. Jung becomes smitten with a new co-worker. Gerald's new girlfriend rubs Janet the wrong way.

programme.title: Kim's Convenience: Appa's First Text
programme.desc: Appa inherits his daughter's old smartphone. Umma finds a stray dog in the store. Janet and Kimchee bond over dim sum.

programme.title: Kim's Convenience: Handy Graduation
programme.desc: At a party to celebrate getting his GED, Jung can't ignore his feelings for Shannon. Meanwhile, Janet grows tired of standing in her brother's shadow.

programme.title: Kim's Convenience: New Appa-liance
programme.desc: Appa's got a plan to get a new appliance for less, Jung looks to mend old fences and Janet searches for a way to differentiate herself online.

programme.title: Kim's Convenience: Cutie Pie
programme.desc: Appa worries Umma will be jealous of a flirty online review. Jung returns to his old stomping grounds. Gerald's girlfriend ruffles Janet's feathers.

programme.title: Kim's Convenience: Open Kimunication
programme.desc: Appa and Umma take their bickering to a new level. Janet crosses paths with a photography idol. Shannon's boyfriend asks Jung for a favor.

programme.title: Kim's Convenience: Thy Neighbour's Wifi
programme.desc: Appa has a solution for spotty Wi-Fi: use the neighbor's. Jung has eyes for Shannon's friend. Umma and Pastor Nina ask Janet to do a church reading.

programme.title: Mr. D: Pilot
programme.desc: Gerry Duncan has finally gotten a full time teaching position at the prestigious Xavier Academy after years of substituting. Unfortunately he’ll be teaching social studies, which he knows nothing about, instead of his dream phys ed job.

programme.title: Mr. D: 24 Hour Famine
programme.desc: Gerry volunteers to help staff the 24 Hour Famine event in an effort to spend time with Xavier’s hot guidance counselor, Eva MacPhee. Meanwhile Lisa has arranged a staff night out at a bar, which turns into a wild night.

programme.title: Mr. D: Grade The Teacher
programme.desc: When Gerry sees how many positive reviews Dwyer has on gradetheteacher.com, he embarks on a campaign to match him somehow. Meanwhile, Simon takes Bobbi’s advice to stand up to a student but ends up making all the other kids think he’s crazy.

programme.title: Mr. D: Exam Week
programme.desc: It’s exam time at Xavier Academy and Gerry is convinced that he will catch a few students who are known to cheat on their exams.

programme.title: Mr. D: Bully Awareness Week
programme.desc: Gerry commits himself to making a video presentation for Bully Awareness Week and finds himself with little time to deliver, while Robert is torn over how he will proceed with a new relationship.

programme.title: Mr. D: The Dance
programme.desc: Gerry organizes a dance fundraiser to cover some costs for the girls basketball team, while Robert reveals to Lisa that he had a dream about Trudy which has made him uncomfortable around her.

programme.title: Mr. D: Job Opportunity
programme.desc: When a job opens up in the phys ed department, Gerry sees his chance at his dream job. Meanwhile, Lisa is assigned a student teacher from hell – who happens to be Callaghan’s niece.

programme.title: Mr. D: Guest Speaker
programme.desc: Gerry needs to find a guest speaker for Career Day. Dwyer supposedly has a good one, and Gerry wants to outdo him. Robert has a fraternity reunion this weekend, and he wants to avoid catching the sickness that’s going around at all costs.

programme.title: Mr. D: Quiz Cup
programme.desc: As Lisa takes over the school’s Quiz Cup academic team and attempts to get them successfully through their upcoming tournament, Bobbi is uncomfortably trying to guide her grade 5’s through their health unit.

programme.title: Mr. D: Field Trip
programme.desc: Gerry has to help Bobbi supervise her Grade 5/6 field trip to the museum, while Jeff and Robert cover his classes back at Xavier.

programme.title: Mr. D: The Basketball Diaries
programme.desc: Gerry is desperate for his first win of the basketball season, but when he finds out his opponents are coached by his ex and her husband, he becomes emotionally involved.

programme.title: Mr. D: Charity Day
programme.desc: Gerry decides to use a boxing match at the school’s annual Charity Day to settle his competition with Mr. Dwyer for the title of Mr. D once and for all.

programme.title: Mr. D: Gerry's Evaluation
programme.desc: When Gerry is evaluated by a member of the board, he must go out of his way to prove that he is great at his job, or risk severe punishment.

programme.title: Mr. D: Late Shift
programme.desc: Gerry takes a second job at Barrels to pay for a new car but struggles to juggle both.

programme.title: Mr. D: World Religions
programme.desc: Gerry's 'World Religions' unit goes off course when he brings his personal views into the classroom.

programme.title: Mr. D: Overnight Trip
programme.desc: Gerry concocts a scheme to get his class to go to Boston so that he and Bill can watch a Celtics game.

programme.title: Mr. D: The Crush
programme.desc: Gerry develops a crush on the Scottish mother of one of his most annoying students.

programme.title: Mr. D: The Other Woman
programme.desc: When Bobbi and her long-term boyfriend Craig break up again, Gerry is there for the rebound... Craig's rebound.

programme.title: Mr. D: The Date
programme.desc: When Bobbi and her long-term boyfriend Craig break up again, Gerry is there for the rebound... Craig's rebound.

programme.title: Mr. D: Gerry's Favourite Couple
programme.desc: Xavier's favourite senior couple, Sean and Miranda ('Searanda'), are on the rocks. Seeing himself in Sean, Gerry decides to meddle in their relationship - they have to stay together or Gerry will suffer a deep personal loss.

programme.title: Mr. D: Poker Night
programme.desc: When Gerry comes across a down and out Daniel Negreanu, he orchestrates a staff poker night in order to get Daniel back on his feet.

programme.title: Mr. D: Staff Retreat
programme.desc: The staff are involved in an elaborate trust game that accidently reveals some of their darkest secrets.

programme.title: Mr. D: Culture Day
programme.desc: Culture Day at Xavier and each teacher has been asked to model their classroom after a country. Gerry pushes for Scotland, only to find that Dwyer already has it.

programme.title: Mr. D: Strip Club
programme.desc: Gerry suspects that Dwyer is moonlighting as a stripper and there's only one way to find out for sure. Gerry and Simon are going to spend a night at the strip club...an all male strip club.

programme.title: Mr. D: Slam Dunk
programme.desc: Gerry tries to convince Bobbi to give him a senior boys basketball team next season. Robert learns that his year end evaluation came with one complaint.

programme.title: Key & Peele: MC Mom
programme.desc: A mother makes a rap video for her college-age son, two grifters try to con each other, and Big Boi has a chance encounter with Andre 3000 at a coffee shop.

programme.title: Key & Peele: Hollywood Sequel Doctor
programme.desc: A brainstorming session for Gremlins 2 goes off the rails, a criminal snitches on his friends and a party guest tries to hide his ignorance about global politics.

programme.title: Key & Peele: The 420 Special
programme.desc: Neil deGrasse Tyson schools his wife on the multiverse theory, the valets get pumped about Game of Thrones, and a telemarketer employs an unexpected strategy.

programme.title: Key & Peele: Meegan & Andre Break Up
programme.desc: Andre and Meegan have a serious talk, a rapper runs into trouble while trying to storm out of an interview, and an airline passenger adapts to life in economy plus.

programme.title: Key & Peele: The End
programme.desc: Ghostbusters singer Ray Parker Jr. unveils his lesser-known songs, a young man is transported to a magical land, and Jordan and Keegan reach their final destination.

programme.title: CSI: Miami: Going Under
programme.desc: A biker who falls off a balcony was an undercover A.T.F. agent. The gang he infiltrated may be running "corner-shot" guns designed for urban warfare, and another agent who also infiltrated the group may hold the key to the case.

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Exit Strategy
programme.desc: Chris’s addiction issues come to a head when an innocuous call to a middle-class home puts Dov and Chris in the middle of a suspicious home invasion investigation

programme.title: Rookie Blue: "Moving Day"
programme.desc: 15 Division is assigned to a community outreach program, “Moving Day”, to help tenants move out of a subsidized-housing complex that’s being torn down

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Fragments
programme.desc: Andy’s former rookie, Duncan, is back on duty and looking to reconcile – something she’s not ready for yet. But personal feelings get thrust aside when a bomb explodes in a downtown parking garage

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Everlasting
programme.desc: The officers of 15 Division work to track down TED MCDONALD (the car-bomber from Ep. 510). But even after catching him, they realize Ted has more targets set to explode out there. The clock is ticking

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Open Windows
programme.desc: Andy is attacked by an intruder at Traci’s place and the Sex Crimes Unit steps in to take over the case their way, 15 Division will have decide whether to take matters into their own hands.

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Perfect Family
programme.desc: Andy’s ideas about what makes a perfect family are put into perspective when she meets an out-of-control teen who needs to be protected from her own conservative family.

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Uprising
programme.desc: A riot breaks out at a women’s correctional institute while Andy, Juliet, Nick, and Gail are there to transfer prisoners. They end up in a lock-down situation that finds Andy and Juliet trapped with a woman desperate to prove her innocence

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Letting Go
programme.desc: When Nick’s estranged older brother emerges with new information on someone from their tragic past, Nick goes off the grid to track the man down. But Juliet is hot on his heels, and Nick is forced to let her into the secrets of his past.

programme.title: Rookie Blue: A Real Gentleman
programme.desc: When Traci is a no-show for her first raid, 15 Division fears the notorious gun dealer they’re after has kidnapped her. But when Andy realizes that the serial rapist we never caught is back, it’s all hands on deck to find Traci

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Home Run
programme.desc: After a community-outreach baseball game erupts in a drive-by shooting, Gail’s relationship with her brother is put to the test . Meanwhile, Swarek plans a getaway with Andy up to Oliver’s cabin, which goes off the rails in every possible way

programme.title: CSI: Miami: CSI Trilogy: Rampage
programme.desc: The Mala Noche gang trial is stopped when the defendant escapes with the help of a fake witness and a gunman in the audience. Delko finds that a beautiful but disturbed ex-lover is stalking any woman who he is now close too, including his sister.

programme.title: CSI: Miami: CSI Trilogy: One of Our Own
programme.desc: Horatio and Delko search Miami to bring down the Mala Noche gang once and for all. The quest to end the crime-spree is jeopardized when Federal agents, led by Agent Glen Cole, raid the CSI lab searching for missing cash evidence, based on an unknown tip.
programme.sub-title: CSI Trilogy: One of Our Own

programme.title: CSI: Miami: Going Under
programme.desc: A biker who falls off a balcony was an undercover A.T.F. agent. The gang he infiltrated may be running "corner-shot" guns designed for urban warfare, and another agent who also infiltrated the group may hold the key to the case.

programme.title: Law & Order: Family Business
programme.desc: When heirs to a store chain are arrested for murder, their father tries to protect them.

programme.title: Law & Order: Entrapment
programme.desc: A young woman acting as an FBI informant successfully frames her friend.

programme.title: Law & Order: Legacy
programme.desc: An angry woman hires a hit man to take care of things.

programme.title: Law & Order: Menace
programme.desc: Ross sets about proving that a known bully is responsible for a girl's suicide.

programme.title: Law & Order: Barter
programme.desc: A financial planner's death reveals the sleazy activities of a loan company.

programme.title: Law & Order: Matrimony
programme.desc: After a wealthy man is murdered, it appears those close to him were after his inheritance.

programme.desc: “My Strange Addiction” tells the story of people who just can't stop doing very strange things, including a compulsive tanner, a runner, a shopper and a chalk eater.

programme.title: My Strange Addiction: Eats Toilet Paper/Blow Dryer
programme.desc: Lori has been sleeping with her blow dryer for 20 years, despite the risk burns or fire. Meanwhile, Kesha's family is concerned that eating half a roll of toilet paper a day is causing health issues.

programme.title: My Strange Addiction: Wears Diapers/Eats Dryer Sheets
programme.desc: For Riley, there's nothing like the comfort of wearing a warm, wet diaper. She lives as an adult baby to escape the stresses of life. And Charmissa chews on dryer sheets for up to 10 hours a day.

programme.title: My Strange Addiction: Addicted to Coffee Enemas/Licks Cats
programme.desc: Trina and her husband Mike have done nearly 7,000 coffee enemas over the last two and a half years. Lisa has been addicted to licking her cat and eating clumps of its hair for three years.

programme.title: My Crazy Obsession: Grown-Up Baby
programme.desc: Stanley, 31, has been obsessed with being an adult baby for the past 18 years. Every day he wears footie pajamas, eats baby food, wears a diaper and sleeps in a crib.

programme.title: My Crazy Obsession: This Little Piggy_All Dolled Up
programme.desc: Sharon’s collection of pig items has exceeded 6,000 and adorns almost every square inch of her home. Rebecca’s obsession with Barbie dolls includes styling her own hair and wardrobe to match her dolls.

programme.title: Supersize Vs Superskinny
programme.desc: It's the mother of all food fights in the feeding clinic as Superskinny carb-phobic Amy Jo Saunders faces up to snackaholic man mountain, thirty eight and a half stoner Andy Duckworth

programme.title: Supersize Vs Superskinny
programme.desc: Long and lanky, 22-year-old Alex Law from Stockport hits the scales at just over ten stone because he barely eats a meal. Tired and exhausted he lives on a diet of caffeine pills supplemented.

programme.title: Supersize Vs Superskinny
programme.desc: Binge eater Wayne swaps diets with fussy eater Lucia. And Anna Richardson tries tower running, ultrasound and infra red, as she bids to get herself a perfect pair of legs.

programme.title: Supersize Vs Superskinny
programme.desc: Tonight it’s an emotional rollercoaster as Supersize cheese addict Stu Preston takes on Superskinny portion controller Alice Duran. At 27 stone 13lbs Stu is digging himself an early grave with a knife and fork and desperately needs help.

programme.title: Supersize Vs Superskinny
programme.desc: Tonight we’re revisiting some of the major success stories from the last series of Supersize Vs Superskinny.Junk food addict Andy Stain, his diet swap partner too busy to eat mum Hannah Ames and Caffeine quaffingJade Potts.

programme.title: Supersize Vs Superskinny
programme.desc: It’s one of the tensest swaps yetas 32 year old monster portion king James Collier goes head to head with uninterested undereater 31 year old ModasserZafar.

programme.title: Supersize Vs Superskinny
programme.desc: We’re revisiting Louise Sapsford, boredom binger Tracy Morgan and too lazy to eat Alex Law and finding out 3 years down the line if their time in the feeding clinic did anything to change their disastrous diets.

programme.title: Supersize Vs Superskinny
programme.desc: Jade weighs just five and half stone, and is desperate to regain her pre-pregnancy size for the sake of her young son. Julie, binges on huge platefuls of home cooked food.

programme.title: Supersize Vs Superskinny
programme.desc: On tonight’s emotional show we revisit 4 people from last series who were in the grip of the life threatening eating disorder, anorexia.

programme.title: Supersize Vs Superskinny
programme.desc: Food hater Louise swaps diets with 39-year-old biker Eddie, who needs to change his diet before it's too late. And Anna Richardson gives up on perfection and accepts what she was born with.

programme.title: Supersize Vs Superskinny
programme.desc: Phillipa is a 48 year old ‘foodie’ from Sheffield who just can’t say no. Gillian is a 24 year old student nurse from Inverness and single mum of two.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER: Don't Push It
programme.desc: Three emergency deliveries in the ER cause a turf war with the labor and delivery department; two gunshot victims have a surprising connection; an unidentified jogger goes into a coma and the ER staff becomes detectives trying to find the woman's family.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER: Holiday ER
programme.desc: On Christmas Eve, a man dressed as Santa is near death - his wife asks his doctor for a special favor: harvest her husband's semen. A man can't breathe because a live fish is stuck in his throat.

programme.title: PRIDEtv
programme.desc: PRIDEtv is the lifestyle television channel for the LGBTQI+ community, open-minded, featuring award-winning arthouse films, captivating documentaries, popular queer series, short films, reality shows, and original TV shows. Your Pride starts here!

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: My Daughter's Plan
programme.desc: Kevin is a retired, successful businessman. He is a single dad to Shannon and Jennifer. Shannon has been accepted into the Ontario Veterinarian College at the University of Guelph.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: Feels Like Home
programme.desc: Laura is on the hunt for a new home for long time clients Marino and Paula. The couple and their three kids would like a spacious house with a country feel to escape their hectic lifestyles.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: Century Homes
programme.desc: Louise, Jason, and their two children have been living in Europe for the past 10 years, but now they would like to be closer to their family in Canada. Louise absolutely adores the European aesthetic.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: Waterfront
programme.desc: Diogo is a dedicated musician working on his new album. He has been debating between moving to Miami or staying in Canada. Toronto is closer to his family and where he feels at home with his music.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: Retirement
programme.desc: Elizabeth and Michael are retired and want to move closer to their kids and grandchildren. They want to downsize from their two-story house into a bungalow. Luckily, Eve knows all about luxury bungalows.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: Sweet Country Home
programme.desc: Tomarra and Rob had just married and blended their two families. As a new family, they want to transition to a quiet neighbourhood away from the hustle and bustle of Toronto. Steve is up for the challenge.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: A Smart Decision
programme.desc: Darlene and Bruce are in the market for a new home and have enlisted Laura to help them out. Darlene's one request is that they stay close to their current home, where their daughter goes to school.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: Pool House
programme.desc: Kathryn and Neil are true urbanites. They love what downtown Toronto has to offer. When Neil found out his company was relocating to Guelph, they weren't thrilled.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: Love the Location
programme.desc: Ashley and Ali are ready to take their relationship and living situation to the next level. The young entrepreneurs are prepared to move into a house, but the one thing they can't agree on is where to live.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: Big Move
programme.desc: Stephanie is making a big move from BC to Guelph to be closer to her son John and his family. She doesn't want the move to be a hassle and is looking for an accessible, decent-sized home for her grandchildren and visitors from BC.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: My Favourite Homes
programme.desc: Steve Bailey, Mike Donia and Daryl King review their favourite homes. Steve takes us down memory lane to his 18th century farmhouse, and another home with a stunning infinity pool.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: House For an Athlete
programme.desc: ??George is a retired basket ball player, and Mada is an international model. For a man over 7 feet tall, finding the perfect house might be a challenge. Danielle knows high ceilings come in all shapes and sizes.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: Treetops
programme.desc: Suhail and Niki have busy schedules. He's a marketing director and she's a doctor so she's often on call for a hospital downtown.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: Above and Beyond
programme.desc: Wendy and Daniel are looking to downsize after their kids have moved out, but still want an elegant home. She's a physical therapist and she's a business analyst.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: Energized
programme.desc: Danielle is helping quite a pair, Joseph is a chiropractor and Nadia is an aerospace engineer. They're looking for a home to start a family. Not only that, they want space to host their extended family. Will it be as difficult as rocket science?

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: Fabulous
programme.desc: Janelle and Manuel are young professionals looking for more space. With one child tagging along on the tour already, they need a place for their growing family. They might need to do some renovations, but they want everything to be perfect.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: Fun House
programme.desc: These two business owners Joseph and Heather work hard and want to play hard! They're looking for a place to entertain guests, and Daryl's got some amazing homes to show them.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: Condo
programme.desc: Downsizing can be a difficult transition & Jin's objective is to make it as seamless as possible. In this episode, Jin is getting outdoors by practicing archery with Mike but mostly just to compete for bragging rights.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: King's Obsession
programme.desc: It is time to upsize! Daryl's client is moving away from downtown Toronto because they desire a bigger space, more privacy, & tranquility.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: Rose Garden
programme.desc: Mike's couple is looking for their luxurious dream home anywhere in between Toronto & Barrie near HWY 400 in a prestigious neighborhood. They have a large dog, tall family, & want to start a family of their own.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: Smart Investment
programme.desc: An amazing beachfront property is what Inez's couple is looking for & these top million dollar agents are sure to surpass their expectations.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: Bucket List
programme.desc: Mike's friend invites him to an Indian wedding & tells him about his uncle who is looking for a luxury condo close to the airport. Daryl, Inez, & Jin support & donate to Mike's charity.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: Right Choice
programme.desc: Somewhere to spend the rest of their days surrounded by nature sounds like a paradise to retire in. Daryl & Jin play some golf to discuss a potential listing she has found & Mike aids Inez in purchasing a new vehicle.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: Big City Home
programme.desc: A young trendy couple wants to start a family in Toronto but they need some help from these top million dollar agents. Jin is a natural daredevil & has always wanted to skydive with her clients.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: City Dreams
programme.desc: Moving in together can be stressful but fun because you are starting a new life together! Inez's client is selling their separate properties & looking for a house or condo.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: Cottage Getaways
programme.desc: Agreeing on a vacation home is made much harder when these top million dollar agents have astounding listings. Mike's client is looking for a waterfront cottage.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: Perfect Neighbourhood
programme.desc: Remarrying is hard enough let alone combining two families under one roof. With a total of 4 children between the ages of 7 & 16 Jin's client is definitely going to need lots of space & land in a safe neighborhood.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: Home Sweet Home
programme.desc: Now that Kristen & Kane have opened an office in Toronto, they will be travelling a lot from Vancouver & want somewhere of their own to stay in.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: Classic Homes Are Timeless
programme.desc: Many people enjoy staying busy & always having a project on the go. Inez's client loves to build & create breathtaking properties. On their next project, this couple wants an interesting property.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: Agents of Million Dollar Homes
programme.desc: Deborah & Vezi are an international couple that want to live in Toronto for one year but has no idea where to start looking. Luckily for them Mike, Jin, Daryl, & Inez have teamed up to find them the home of their dreams.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: Glass House (Part 1)
programme.desc: The King is back, baby! Daryl King is known to make an entrance, and he wants the houses he shows to have that same "wow" factor. His clients are looking for a grand mansion

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: Glass House (Part 2)
programme.desc: Will Daryl be able to dazzle his clients and find a property that will take their breath away?

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: A Palace Fit for a Princess (Part 1)
programme.desc: International luxury realtor Mike Donia jets off to Thailand to work with a client and good friend of his, Mae. She is moving back to her hometown of Bangkok to pursue her modeling career, and is looking for the house of her dreams.
programme.sub-title: A Palace Fit for a Princess (Part 1)

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent
programme.desc: With the help of a Bangkok real estate expert, Max Gloeckner, Mike is confident he can deliver just what Mae is looking for. This episode features the last two of four properties.
programme.sub-title: A Palace Fit for a Princess (Part 2)

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: Infinite View (Part 1)
programme.desc: Vicky is searching for a home in The Beaches for her and her family. No one knows the Beach like Inez Kudryk, so Vicky enlists her help in finding some stunning luxury properties to tour.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: Infinite View (Part 2)
programme.desc: Will Vicky find the forever home of her dreams? This episode features the last two of four properties, as well as the reveal of which house the clients decide to purchase and special appearances by guest agent Jasmine Xuereb.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent: Sunset on the Patio (Part 1)
programme.desc: Steve Bailey to save the day! This week's episode features the lovely couple Chris and Rosa as they search for the perfect home.

programme.title: COPS: Cops Cats and Dogs
programme.desc: A trespassing man uses his dog as a shield when police arrive at the scene, a stolen tablet leads to a bloody altercation, and kittens run wild in a Florida neighborhood.

programme.title: COPS: Cops Sittin' in the Dark
programme.desc: A suspect seen fleeing a vehicle refuses to admit he was ever in said vehicle, and police respond to a call that shots were fired.

programme.title: COPS: Cops The Blame Game
programme.desc: An arrested man has a long list of instructions for his "bae," and a driver charged with heroin possession claims he was framed by the passenger in his backseat.

programme.title: COPS: Cops Brotherly Love
programme.desc: A recently released convict leads police on a high-speed chase in a stolen vehicle, and officers respond to a report of a man pulling a knife on his brother.

programme.title: COPS: Cops That's My Grill
programme.desc: A son fights his mom and responding officers, a man tells police the wad of weed in his mouth is not his, and a pack of cigarillos is the root of a domestic dispute.
